title: WFH WordPress Developer
description:
Job description:

This is a 100% work from home remote position.

This is an independent contractor position working for a US company.

It is expected that you have your own computer and internet connection.

There is no guarantee of hours, this is at an as-needed basis.



Job Summary:

We’re seeking a WordPress PHP Developer to assist with troubleshooting complex site issues and building or maintaining custom plugins. In this role, you’ll work directly with the owner to understand project requirements and translate them into reliable, well-documented code that aligns with WordPress best practices.



You should be comfortable diving into both frontend and backend issues, debugging plugin conflicts, customizing themes, and extending WordPress functionality through custom development. Tasks may include plugin development from scratch, modifying existing plugins, resolving performance issues, and implementing third-party integrations as needed.



Strong attention to detail is a must.



Responsibilities:

Develop, customize, and maintain WordPress plugins and themes using PHP, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript.

Collaborate with project managers and end-users to gather and understand functional requirements for site features and plugin behavior.

Troubleshoot and resolve technical issues related to WordPress performance, plugin conflicts, and frontend/backend errors.

Stay up-to-date with the latest WordPress core updates, plugin standards, and development best practices, suggesting improvements where needed.

Integrate WordPress with third-party APIs and external services.

Work closely with other developers and tea
mbers on broader site architecture and performance improvements.

Create and maintain documentation for custom code, plugin configurations, and development workflows.

title: Experienced Zoho Developer Needed - Client Projects + Extension Development
description:
Job Description

This is a 100% work from home remote position.

This is an independent contractor position working for a US company.

It is expected that you have your own computer and internet connection.

There is no guarantee of hours, this is at an as-needed basis.



Job Summary

Are you a Deluge developer and experienced Zoho user looking for your next big challenge? As a Zoho Deluge Programmer, you will be implementing and maintaining customized solutions within the Zoho suite of applications. You will work closely with the owner to understand business requirements and translate them into efficient and scalable Deluge scripts. This is a role with expectations that you are familiar with Zoho CRM, Desk, Books, Recruit, and/or other Zoho applications.



The role will require completing complex tasks such as scripting with Deluge, to updating various settings and/or entries within the Zoho suite of applications, along with other misc tasks requested by clients.



To be fully considered for this position, attention to detail is critically important.



Responsibilities

Develop and customize Zoho applications using Deluge scripting language to meet specific business requirements.

Collaborate with project managers and end-users to gather and understand functional requirements.

Design, implement, and maintain scalable and efficient Deluge scripts for various Zoho modules, including CRM, Creator, Books, and others.

Troubleshoot and resolve issues related to Zoho applications and integrations.

Stay up-to-date with the latest Zoho features and updates, and proactively suggest improvements to existing systems.

Work closely with other tea
mbers to integrate Zoho applications with other systems and third-party APIs.

Create and maintain documentation for Deluge scripts, workflows, and configurations.

title: Founding Sales Executive (US Market, Remote)
description:
Schedule: Full-time contractor, with working hours overlapping US time zones (Pacific to Eastern)

Pay: Weekly

Compensation: Performance-based with scaling base pay, commissions, and bonuses



About

We provide premium managed WordPress services for US-based businesses. Our core services include managed WordPress hosting, maintenance, performance optimization, and managed local SEO. We also offer WordPress support, development, and design services.



We are a small but growing company focused on delivering a polished, premium client experience. Our approach is rooted in empathy. We take the time to understand the problems clients are facing and provide practical, high-quality solutions that genuinely help.



We are now hiring a Founding Sales Executive to build our outbound sales motion from the ground up.



The Role

This is not a plug-and-play sales job. We do not have an existing outbound sales machine for you to step into. We are looking for someone who wants to take ownership of sales like an entrepreneur would. You will be responsible for building and executing your own outreach strategy, identifying target markets, starting conversations, qualifying leads, following up, and closing new business.



You will have the freedom to do what you do best. We will provide the core tools you need, including an
 address, outbound
 system, phone system, and reasonable tool support as needed. Early on, you will work closely with the owner to get aligned and supported. Over time, the expectation is that you will operate independently and own the sales process. This role is ideal for someone who is self-directed, resourceful, highly motivated by performance-based earnings, and excited by the idea of building something from scratch.



Responsibilities

Creating and executing your own outbound sales strategy

Identifying industries, niches, and ideal customer profiles to target

Prospecting and generating leads through cold
, cold calling, and other outbound methods

Starting conversations with US-based business owners and decision-makers

Qualifying opportunities and moving them through the sales process

Collaborating with the owner on quotes and proposals until you are comfortable scoping accurately

Closing new recurring service clients and one-time project work

Maintaining a professional, respectful sales approach with no pushy tactics



What You Will Not Be Responsible For

Account management after the sale

Ongoing client delivery

Internal CRM/reporting setup and system administration



What We’re Looking For

B2B sales experience

Strong experience or confidence in outbound sales

Excellent spoken and written English

Comfortable speaking with US-based prospects by phone and
 in a professional, polished way

Able to work during hours that overlap with US time zones, especially Pacific through Eastern

Self-starter who does not need constant direction

Organized, disciplined, and results-focused

Comfortable helping shape target market strategy instead of waiting for a script

Experience selling digital services such as SEO, web development, hosting, maintenance, or similar services is strongly preferred



Compensation

This role is designed to reward new business creation clearly and aggressively, while keeping compensation simple, transparent, and tied to performance



Currency and Conversion

Our client revenue is primarily billed in USD, so sales goals are measured in USD. Compensation is paid in PHP as much as possible.



For commission payouts tied to USD revenue:

payout amounts are calculated from the USD value of the business closed

then converted and paid in PHP

all PHP commission examples below are approximate and subject to exchange-rate changes at the time of payout



For planning examples below, a simple reference rate of 55 PHP = 1 USD is used.



Base Pay

Ramp base: 15,000 PHP per month for the first full quarter

Once the rep meets the standard first-quarter goal of $2,500 USD in new MRR, base pay increases to 30,000 PHP per month starting the following quarter

If the rep does not yet meet the first-quarter goal, ramp base remains in place until that quarterly goal is achieved



Managed Service Commission

For new recurring service clients you personally source and close:



25% of the first month’s MRR after the client’s first payment clears

25% of the first month’s MRR after the client remains active for 60 days



This means total commission on recurring services is equal to 50% of the first month’s MRR, paid in two parts.



Example:

If you close $2,000 USD in MRR, total commission would be approximately 55,000 PHP, paid as:



27,500 PHP after first payment clears

27,500 PHP after 60 days active



Actual PHP amounts remain subject to exchange-rate conversion at payout.



Project Commission

For one-time or hourly work such as design, development, or support:



10% of collected revenue, converted and paid in PHP



Monthly MRR Sales Goals and Bonuses

Bonuses are tied to new recurring revenue closed during the month.



Standard monthly goal: $1,500 USD in new MRR

Bonus: 10,000 PHP

Performance target: $2,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 15,000 PHP

Total bonus at $2,000 = 25,000 PHP

High-performance tier: $2,500 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 10,000 PHP

Total bonus at $2,500 = 35,000 PHP

Top-performance tier: $3,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 10,000 PHP

Total bonus at $3,000 = 45,000 PHP

Above $3,000 USD in new MRR:

Additional 7,500 PHP for every extra $500 USD in new MRR during that month



Monthly bonus examples

$1,500 new MRR = 10,000 PHP

$2,000 new MRR = 25,000 PHP

$2,500 new MRR = 35,000 PHP

$3,000 new MRR = 45,000 PHP

$3,500 new MRR = 52,500 PHP

$4,000 new MRR = 60,000 PHP

Quarterly MRR Sales Goals and Bonuses



Quarterly bonuses are tied to total new recurring revenue closed during the quarter.



Standard quarterly goal: $4,500 USD in new MRR

Bonus: 25,000 PHP

Performance quarterly target: $6,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $6,000 = 45,000 PHP

High-performance quarterly target: $7,500 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $7,500 = 65,000 PHP

Top-performance quarterly target: $9,000 USD in new MRR

Additional bonus: 20,000 PHP

Total bonus at $9,000 = 85,000 PHP

Above $9,000 USD in new MRR for the quarter:

Additional 15,000 PHP for every extra $1,500 USD in new MRR



Quarterly bonus examples

$4,500 quarterly new MRR = 25,000 PHP

$6,000 quarterly new MRR = 45,000 PHP

$7,500 quarterly new MRR = 65,000 PHP

$9,000 quarterly new MRR = 85,000 PHP

$10,500 quarterly new MRR = 100,000 PHP



Example Earnings: Rep Closes $2,000 USD in New MRR Per Month

Here is a simple example of what earnings could look like for a rep who consistently closes $2,000 USD in new MRR each month.



Assumptions:

reference conversion rate is 55 PHP = 1 USD

all clients remain active long enough for the 60-day commission release

this example does not include one-time project commissions



First Quarter

The rep closes:



Month 1: $2,000 new MRR

Month 2: $2,000 new MRR

Month 3: $2,000 new MRR



Total for the quarter:

$6,000 USD in new MRR

This exceeds the standard first-quarter goal and qualifies the rep for the higher ongoing base pay starting the next quarter



Month 1

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 1 earnings: approximately 67,500 PHP



Month 2

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 2 earnings: approximately 67,500 PHP



Month 3

Base pay: 15,000 PHP

Monthly bonus for hitting $2,000 new MRR: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on Month 3’s $2,000 MRR: 27,500 PHP

60-day retained commission from Month 1’s deal: 27,500 PHP



Total Month 3 earnings: approximately 95,000 PHP



Quarterly Bonus

Because the rep closed $6,000 USD in new MRR for the quarter, they earn:



25,000 PHP for hitting the quarterly goal of $4,500

20,000 PHP additional for hitting the quarterly target of $6,000



Total quarterly bonus: 45,000 PHP



First-Quarter Earnings Summary

For a rep who closes $2,000 USD in new MRR each month in the first quarter:



Month 1 earnings: 67,500 PHP

Month 2 earnings: 67,500 PHP

Month 3 earnings: 95,000 PHP

Quarterly bonus: 45,000 PHP



Total paid during the quarter: approximately 275,000 PHP



In addition, there would still be future retained commission releases from:



Month 2 deal: 27,500 PHP

Month 3 deal: 27,500 PHP



Additional commission scheduled after quarter-end: approximately 55,000 PHP, assuming those clients remain active through the 60-day mark.



Ongoing Earnings After Ramp



Because the rep met the first-quarter goal, base pay increases to 30,000 PHP per month starting in the next quarter.



If the rep continues closing $2,000 USD in new MRR per month, a normal month after ramp would look like:



Base pay: 30,000 PHP

Monthly bonus: 25,000 PHP

First commission payment on current month’s deal: 27,500 PHP

Retained commission from deals closed 60 days earlier: 27,500 PHP



Typical ongoing monthly earnings after ramp: approximately 110,000 PHP, plus quarterly bonuses when earned.



Note: All USD-based commission amounts are converted and paid in PHP using the company’s standard exchange rate at the time of payout.



Tools and Support

We will provide:

Company
 address

Outbound
 system

Phone system

Reasonable support for additional tools, subject to discussion and feasibility



Work Environment Requirements

Reliable computer

Quality headset

Stable internet connection

Quiet, professional work environment



How We Sell

Our approach is simple: be helpful, be clear, and do not be pushy. We are not interested in aggressive or high-pressure sales tactics. There are more than enough businesses in the US to target. If someone is not interested, we move on professionally. We want someone who can sell with confidence and empathy, without becoming transactional or forceful.



Why This Role Is Different

This is a founding sales role. You will not be one of many people on a large sales team. You will be one of the first people shaping how sales works inside the business. If you want autonomy, ownership, performance-based upside, and the chance to help build a real growth engine from the ground up, this role is for you.

title: Graphic Designer
description:
Freelance Graphic Designer Wanted — Multi-Brand, Ongoing Work



Hi! I'm looking for a talented, experienced graphic designer who's excited to work across multiple brands in a variety of industries. If you love creative variety and want a steady stream of interesting projects, keep reading — this might be perfect for you.





ABOUT THE WORK



I work with clients across different industries, helping them build and maintain a strong digital presence. Projects vary, but typically include:



• Social media graphics & templates

• Flyers and marketing collateral

• Website layout designs (not required, but nice to have this experience)

• Trade show booth graphics

• Business cards &
 signatures

• Sales deck updates



Consistency across each client's brand is everything — so an eye for detail and the ability to work within existing brand guidelines is a must. I have a consistent flow of work now, with more clients coming on regularly, so there's real opportunity for an ongoing working relationship.



About Visionary Advantages:

We're a brand studio and marketing agency working with entrepreneurs and growing businesses across multiple industries globally. From brand identity and web design to social media and packaging, we help our clients build distinctive, lasting brands. As our client roster grows, so does our team — and we're looking for creative collaborators who want to grow with us.





WHAT I'M LOOKING FOR



• Proficiency in Adobe Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.) — required

• A strong, varied portfolio showing real client work

• Ability to manage multiple projects and brands at once

• Clear communicator who meets deadlines

• Flexible availability (bonus points if you can hop on a call during US EST hours when needed every once in a while)



This is a freelance position with flexible hours. Work volume will vary by week, but we do have a reliable, ongoing flow of projects.



HOW TO APPLY



Please send the following to 



1. Write exactly 2 paragraphs about yourself — your experience and why you're the right fit (no more, no less)

2. Links to your portfolio or past work samples — applications without examples will not be considered

3. Make the Subject line of your
 say: Design Expert



Looking forward to seeing your work!

title: Reservations Specialist
description:
MUST HAVE EXPERIENCE WITH AIRBNB AND SHORT TERM RENTALS - DO NOT APPLY IF YOU DON'T HAVE EXPERIENCE



Answering Messages from Guests: This involves promptly responding to inquiries, requests, and concerns from guests via various communication channels like airbnb, vrbo, booking.com and hospitable



Ensuring Daily Operations Run Smoothly: This includes overseeing tasks such as check-ins and check-outs, managing reservations, coordinating with housekeeping and maintenance staff, and addressing any issues that arise during the day.



Monitoring Security Cameras: Keeping an eye on security cameras helps ensure the safety and security of guests and the property. This duty may involve identifying and addressing any security concerns or incidents that occur.



Following Up with Inquiries: After initial guest inquiries, following up to provide additional information, answer questions, or assist with booking arrangements can help convert inquiries into reservations.



Maximizing Revenue: This involves implementing strategies to increase occupancy rates, upsell services or amenities, adjust pricing based on demand, and optimize revenue streams.



Creating New Listings: Developing appealing listings for properties on various booking platforms, including writing compelling descriptions, selecting attractive photos, and setting accurate pricing and availability.



Updating Listing Information: Keeping property listings up-to-date with accurate information regarding amenities, policies, availability, and pricing to ensure potential guests have the most current and relevant details.



Coordinating with Ground Team: Collaborating with cleaning and maintenance staff to ensure properties are well-maintained, cleaned, and prepared for guests' arrivals.



This role requires strong communication, organizational, and problem-solving skills, as well as the ability to multitask and prioritize effectively to meet the needs of both guests and the property.

description:
Experienced Shopify Expert Needed for Store Build, Optimization, and Ongoing Support



We are an e-commerce business looking for a highly experienced Shopify expert to help build, optimize, troubleshoot, and maintain our Shopify store.



We already have general development support in place, but we are looking for a dedicated Shopify specialist with deeper platform expertise. We want someone who truly knows Shopify inside and out and can help us build things correctly, solve problems quickly, and improve overall store performance and functionality.



This role will begin on a project/gig basis, but for the right person it can turn into steady, long-term work.



What we need help with:



Shopify store setup, rebuilds, and structural improvements

Theme edits and customization

Liquid, HTML, CSS, and JavaScript changes as needed

App setup, integration, and troubleshooting

Resolving bugs, conflicts, and broken functionality

Cart, checkout, shipping, tax, payment, and discount setup

Speed and performance optimization

QA testing to ensure everything works properly across the store

Connecting and configuring tools such as
, SMS, reviews, upsells, analytics, and tracking pixels

Ongoing Shopify maintenance and support as needed



You are a strong fit if you:



Have significant hands-on Shopify experience

Can troubleshoot issues efficiently and recommend the right solution

Understand both technical execution and the practical needs of an e-commerce business

Communicate clearly and professionally

Are dependable, organized, and detail-oriented

Can work carefully inside an existing store without creating new problems

Can explain what you changed, why you changed it, and what results to expect



Important: Please apply honestly.



We have hired for Shopify work before, and we can usually tell very quickly who truly has expert-level experience and who does not. If your background is overstated, or if you are still at a beginner or intermediate level, it will become clear early in the process.



We are specifically looking for someone with real, proven Shopify expertise — someone who understands how to build, manage, troubleshoot, and improve Shopify stores at a high level. This is not the right fit for someone who has only worked on a few simple stores or assisted in a limited role.



If you are a genuine Shopify expert, we would be glad to speak with you. If not, please do not apply.



To apply, please send the following:



Your resume

Links to Shopify stores or projects you have worked on

A brief explanation of exactly what you did on each project

Examples of projects you are currently working on, if applicable

Which areas of Shopify you are strongest in

themes

custom coding

troubleshooting

app integrations

speed optimization

store setup

other relevant specialties

Your current availability and typical turnaround time

Your usual hourly rate based on your experience and profile

A short note explaining why you believe you are a strong fit for this role



We are looking for someone reliable we can continue working with as needs come up. For the right person, this can become an ongoing long-term opportunity.



To show that you read this post carefully, please put SHOPIFY PRO at the top of your application.



Best regards,

Eric

title: Go High Level Funnel Builder (Full Sales Funnel Build – Travel Group Experience)
description:
We are a luxury travel brand specializing in cruise experiences and hosted international group travel.

We are launching multiple China group trips (2–3 groups of 60 travelers each) and need an experienced Go High Level expert to build a high-converting sales funnel from scratch.

Goal:

Build a complete funnel that drives registrations and payments for 120–180 travelers from international markets (primarily Australia and Singapore).

Scope of Work:

Build a full funnel inside Go High Level from scratch

Create a high-converting landing page (sales page)

Set up group selection (2–3 groups with separate payment links)

Integrate Stripe payment links for service fees

Create checkout and thank-you pages

Set up
 and/or SMS follow-up automation

Ensure mobile optimization and clean user experience

Structure the funnel for conversions (clear CTA, urgency, flow)

Focus:

This is a SALES funnel, not just a design project.

We want a clean, simple, high-converting layout that drives action.

Target Audience:

International travelers from visa-friendly countries such as Australia and Singapore.

The funnel should:

Highlight a curated, hosted China experience

Reduce friction for international travelers

Build trust and authority

Clearly guide users to register and secure their spot

Requirements:

Proven experience with Go High Level (must provide examples)

Experience building high-converting funnels (not just design)

Experience integrating Stripe or payment systems

Strong understanding of conversion-focused design

Ability to complete the project quickly

Bonus:

Experience with travel or event funnels

Understanding of lead generation and client conversion

To apply:

Include the word "CHINA" and provide 2–3 examples of funnels you have built.

Project Type:

One-time project (with potential for ongoing work)

Budget:

$300–$600 depending on experience and quality

We are looking for someone who understands SALES and CONVERSION, not just design.

?

	•	Integrate AI tools with websites, CRMs, and internal systems

	•	Develop structured prompt systems and reusable workflows

	•	Continuously optimize systems for performance and efficiency

	•	Identify opportunities to replace manual processes with automation



?

	•	Strong experience with leading AI tools:

	•	ChatGPT (OpenAI)

	•	Claude (Anthropic)

	•	Claude Code (for development workflows)

?

?



What We’re Looking For

	•	Someone who thinks in systems, not tasks

?

This is not a theoretical role. We are looking for someone who can build, test, and deploy real systems.



?

?

title: Wedding Video Editor
description:
Job Description:

We're a wedding photography and videography studio based in New York (RF Studios) looking for a talented video editor to join our remote team on a per-project basis.

You'll be responsible for editing wedding footage into polished, emotional highlight videos (typically 3–6 minutes), full documentary-style films (15 minutes - 2 hours), and short social media cuts for Instagram Reels and TikTok. Raw footage will be organized and delivered to you via shared drive. You'll deliver finished files according to our templates and style guide.

What you'll be editing:



Wedding highlight reels (cinematic, music-driven, emotionally paced)

Full documentary-style wedding films (ceremony, speeches, reception)

Social media content from wedding footage (30–90 second vertical cuts)

Occasional anniversary, Birthday, or Engagement session videos



Requirements:



Strong portfolio of wedding highlight reels (please include links)

Proficient in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve (Mainly Premiere Pro)

Strong color grading and audio sync skills

Able to work within a provided style guide and deliver clean, organized project files

Good communication and ability to meet deadlines

Experience with lower thirds, titles, and transitions preferred



Delivery format: H.264 exports + raw project file backups

Wage/Salary: Negotiable based on experience

Hours per week: 5–15 hours (varies by season; busy season May–October)

title: Real Estate Video Editor + Photo Retoucher (Walkthroughs, Dollhouse, Virtual Staging)
description:

RF Media is a Long Island-based marketing agency serving real estate agents across Long Island and greater NYC. We're looking for a detail-oriented editor with real estate media experience to handle post-production for property listings on a per-project basis.

You should understand what makes a listing look premium clean HDR photo edits, smooth walkthrough video cuts, and familiarity with tools like Matterport, Zillow 3D, or similar platforms for dollhouse/3D floor plan presentations.

What you'll be editing:



Interior and exterior listing photos (HDR blending, sky replacement, window pull, color correction)

Walkthrough/tour videos (smooth cuts, licensed music, agent intro/outro if provided)

Drone footage integration into listing videos

Virtual staging assistance or coordination

Dollhouse or 3D floor plan exports (Matterport or similar experience preferred, not required)

Short listing teasers for Instagram/Facebook (Reels format)



Requirements:



Real estate photo/video portfolio required (listing photos + at least one walkthrough video)

Proficient in Lightroom, Photoshop, Premiere Pro or similar

Familiar with HDR blending and sky replacement techniques

Understanding of real estate listing standards (MLS-ready photos)

Bonus: experience with Matterport, EyeSpy360, or virtual staging tools

Organized, reliable, and able to deliver within 24–48 hour turnaround when needed



Wages depend on work experience 

Hours per week: 5–20 hours depending on listing volume

title: Cinematic Business Video Editor (Marketing Content, Brand Films, Social Media)
description:

This is an ongoing role you'll be our go-to editor for business clients who need consistent, cinematic-quality video marketing. You'll receive organized raw footage, brand guidelines, and brief notes, and deliver finished content ready to post or hand off to the client.

What you'll be editing:



Before & after project videos for contractors (roofing, remodeling, landscaping, etc.)

Business brand films and company overview videos (1–3 minutes)

Social media content Reels, TikToks, YouTube Shorts (30–90 seconds)

Testimonial and interview edits

Ad creatives for
/Instagram campaigns

Occasional voiceover sync and motion graphics (basic title cards, lower thirds)



Requirements:



Strong portfolio of business/brand video content (not just personal projects)

Proficient in Premiere Pro or DaVinci Resolve

Strong color grading, pacing, and storytelling instincts

Ability to work independently from a brief we don't want to micromanage edits

Experience creating content specifically for social media algorithms (vertical formats, hook-first editing)

Consistent communication and reliable turnaround (typically 48–72 hours per deliverable)

Motion graphics experience (After Effects or Premiere titles) is a big plus



Wages depend on work experience 

Hours per week: 10–25 hours (scalable as client volume grows)

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor
description:
We are a growing Australian business in the home fragrance category operating across retail and e-commerce channels. Our products include home fragrance and personal care items sold to customers in Australia and internationally.



We are looking for a mid-level Graphic Designer & Video Editor with a solid foundation in design principles and experience creating high-quality creative across digital and retail environments.



Role Overview: This is a full-time contract role (40 hours per week), fully remote and aligned with Australian Eastern Standard Time (AEST). You will be responsible for producing high-quality visual and video content for paid media, website, marketplaces, and retail use. This role is suited to someone who understands design systems, hierarchy, layout, typography, and brand consistency.



Key Responsibilities

• Edit short-form video content for paid social (Meta, TikTok and other platforms)

• Design high-performing static creatives for digital advertising and EDMs.

• Create multiple variations of ads for testing and optimisation

• Develop PDP (product detail page) assets for Shopify and other e-commerce platforms

• Create and optimise product listings for Amazon and other marketplaces

• Design POS and retail assets including packaging, in-store displays and collateral

• Apply brand guidelines consistently across all outputs

• Work closely with the marketing team to execute campaigns and creative briefs

• Deliver high-quality work with fast turnaround times



Required Experience

• 2+ years experience in graphic design and video editing (agency or e-commerce ideal)

• Strong understanding of design fundamentals (layout, hierarchy, typography, spacing, visual balance)

• Proven ability to follow and apply brand guidelines across multiple formats

• Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro, Canva, Figma and CapCut

• Experience using AI creative tools (e.g. Kive, Nanobanana, Midjourney or similar) to enhance creative output, generate concepts, and improve workflow efficiency

• Experience creating content for e-commerce brands

• Experience designing for paid social media (Meta, TikTok etc.)

• Experience creating PDP assets and marketplace listings (Shopify, Amazon or similar)

• High attention to detail and strong quality control

• Ability to manage workload and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment

• Strong English communication skills



Contract Structure

This contract will commence with an initial three-month engagement. This allows both parties to ensure a strong fit. For the right candidate, there is strong potential for the contract to continue beyond this period.



Application Instructions

To apply, please begin your application with:

Creative Specialist

Then include:

• A link to your portfolio and resume (applications without this will not be reviewed)

• Confirmation you can work during AEST business hours

Shortlisted candidates will complete a short practical design task.

title: Marketplace Content & Creative Strategist
description:
We are seeking a versatile, detail-oriented Marketplace Content & Creative Strategist to lead the development and optimization of product listings across Amazon and other e-commerce marketplaces. This role brings together keyword research, AI-assisted content writing, graphic design, and project management to produce high-performing listing assets and brand experiences.



This is an ideal role for someone who thrives at the intersection of SEO, creative development, and cross-functional coordination, and who enjoys using modern AI tools to work efficiently and creatively.



==KEY RESPONSIBILITIES==

SEO & CONTENT DEVELOPMENT

Conduct advanced keyword and market research using tools such as Helium 10, Data Dive, or similar platforms.



Write and refine product listing content (titles, bullets, descriptions) using a combination of research, brand guidelines, and AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Jasper).



Develop structured prompts, briefs, and templates to support high-quality AI-generated content at scale.



Ensure content accuracy, brand consistency, and marketplace compliance across all listings.



GRAPHIC DESIGN & CREATIVE PRODUCTION

Create, refine, and optimize graphics for Amazon and marketplace listings, including lifestyle graphics, feature callouts, infographics, and A+ content modules.



Use a suite of AI-enhanced design tools including:

ChatGPT Premium for creative ideation, prompt writing, visual concepting

Freepik Premium for assets, templates, and illustration resources

Adobe Photoshop Generative Fill for product cleanup, scene enhancements, and creative editing

Canva AI Upscaler for resolution improvements and design composition

Google AI Studio for advanced generative image and asset creation

Nano Banana AI for enhanced mockups, image variations, and visual refinements



Translate keyword and SEO insights into effective visual storytelling and conversion-oriented design.



Collaborate with internal teams to iterate on creative assets and ensure compliance with marketplace image standards.



Maintain high production quality across all visual assets.



PROJECT MANAGEMENT & CROSS-FUNCTIONAL WORKFLOW

Manage end-to-end listing optimization projects, from kickoff through final delivery.



Coordinate with SEO, design, account management, and brand teams to keep projects on schedule.



Use project management tools and Google Workspace and Asana to organize workflows, gather inputs, and track deliverables.



Oversee quality assurance for both content and design before listings go live.



==REQUIRED EXPERIENCE & SKILLS==

3+ years of experience in e-commerce content strategy, listing optimization, creative production, or project management.

Strong SEO research skills with Amazon-focused tools (e.g., Helium 10, Data Dive).

Proven ability to manage multiple content and creative projects simultaneously.

Experience with generative AI platforms and developing effective prompts.

Demonstrated graphic design abilities using Photoshop, Canva, or equivalent tools.

Excellent organization, communication, and self-editing skills.

Comfortable with Google Workspace tools and project management systems.



==NICE TO HAVE==

Experience working with multiple brands or in an agency environment.

Familiarity with Amazon’s image, copy, and compliance guidelines.

Ability to review performance metrics (CTR, conversion rate, rank) to inform content and creative decisions.

Understanding of UX/UI-driven marketplace design principles.



==WHY JOIN US==

A collaborative, innovative, and fast-paced environment focused on leveraging AI to maximize performance.

Opportunities to work across a wide range of brands and product categories.

Creative freedom to explore new tools, design approaches, and SEO strategies.

Room for growth within a rapidly expanding organization.

title: Web ai & Automation Developer
description:
Job Title: Web Ai & Automation Developer

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time

Salary: Competitive, based on experience



About Wandering Lion



Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not believe in disconnected marketing activity or bloated delivery. We build structured brand, web, marketing, reporting, and operational systems that support clearer positioning, stronger trust, and better commercial performance.



Our work sits at the intersection of brand, performance, and systems. That means websites, landing pages, automations, and digital infrastructure are not treated as isolated tasks. They are built as commercial assets designed to improve credibility, user experience, conversion, efficiency, and scale.



About the Role



We are looking for a highly capable Web & Automation Developer who can build, improve, and maintain digital systems across a range of modern platforms, tools, and workflows.



This is not a narrow WordPress or platform-only role. We want someone who is confident working across websites, landing pages, integrations, automations, AI tools, and digital infrastructure that supports both internal operations and client delivery.



You should be able to work across different website environments such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume, landing page builders, and other modern web platforms, while also bringing strong capability in AI tools, automation systems, process improvement, and connected workflow design.



The right person will understand that a website is only one part of the growth system. What matters is how the website, user journey, data flow, automations, and supporting tools work together to improve trust, efficiency, and conversion.



Key Responsibilities



Website development across multiple platforms

Build, customise, maintain, and improve websites and landing pages across a range of modern platforms and environments, depending on project needs.



Flexible platform capability

Work confidently across different website ecosystems such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume-supported builds, page builders, CMS tools, and similar digital platforms without being limited to a single system.



Landing pages and conversion builds

Develop landing pages, campaign pages, and user journey components that support lead generation, offer clarity, conversion, and stronger customer experience.



AI and automation implementation

Set up and improve automations, AI-enabled workflows, and connected systems that reduce manual work, improve reporting, increase delivery efficiency, and strengthen operational scalability.



Tool and system integrations

Connect websites and digital assets with forms, CRM systems, analytics, tracking tools, scheduling tools,
 platforms, automation software, internal workflow tools, and other core business systems.



Performance and optimisation

Improve website speed, technical performance, responsiveness, usability, and front-end quality across devices and browsers.



Troubleshooting and technical support

Identify and resolve bugs, integration issues, layout problems, platform conflicts, broken workflows, and performance issues in a reliable and timely way.



SEO and technical readiness

Support strong technical setup across metadata, structure, indexing readiness, page performance, and clean implementation practices.



Build workflow improvement

Use modern tools, systems, templates, AI support, and automation processes to improve how websites and digital assets are planned, built, handed over, and maintained.



Cross-functional collaboration

Work closely with strategy, design, content, paid media, and operations teams to ensure builds align with broader brand and commercial goals.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience building and maintaining websites across a range of platforms, not just one CMS

Strong capability in web development, landing page builds, technical implementation, and front-end execution

Strong experience with AI tools, automation systems, workflow software, and digital integrations

Ability to work across tools such as Shopify, Webflow, WordPress, Relume, page builders, and other modern website platforms

Experience connecting websites with CRM systems, forms, analytics, tracking, scheduling tools, and automation platforms

Strong understanding of responsive design, user experience, technical performance, and front-end quality

Strong problem-solving ability and attention to detail

Ability to build systems that are not only visually polished, but also commercially useful and operationally efficient

Strong communication skills and the ability to work well with cross-functional teams

A reliable, structured, quality-focused approach to delivery

Preferred

Experience with Zapier, Make, n8n, or similar automation platforms

Experience using AI tools to support development, QA, content workflows, reporting, process improvement, or internal efficiency

Experience with Shopify theme edits, Webflow builds, custom WordPress work, Relume workflows, and landing page builders

Experience with conversion-focused development and high-performing landing page structures

Familiarity with technical SEO, tracking setup, and analytics implementation

Experience supporting service-based, eCommerce, or founder-led brands

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Websites and landing pages are polished, responsive, technically strong, and commercially aligned

Automations reduce manual work and improve internal efficiency

Systems are better connected across web, CRM, forms, reporting, and delivery workflows

Technical issues are solved quickly and thoroughly

The team can rely on you to build and maintain high-quality digital infrastructure

Your work contributes to stronger trust, better conversion, smoother delivery, and more scalable operations

Why Join Wandering Lion



You will be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, systems, and delivery under one roof.



That means:



You will work on thoughtful, strategy-led projects

You will build digital systems that support real commercial outcomes

You will have room to improve both execution quality and operational efficiency

You will be part of a team that values honesty, clarity, accountability, and high standards

How to Apply



Please send:



your CV / resume

your portfolio

examples of websites, landing pages, systems, or automations you have built or improved

a short introduction about yourself

details of the platforms, AI tools, automation tools, and workflow systems you use



Tell us why you are a strong fit for the role and include examples of how your work has improved website performance, automation, efficiency, or commercial outcomes.



Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Senior Residential Appraisal Report Writer
description:
I run a residential appraisal firm located in the Bay Area, California, and am looking for an experienced residential appraisal writer to join the team. The team includes 3 Bay Area appraisers and 8 employees in the Philippines. We are rapidly growing and are looking for an experienced and senior level residential report writer to join our team.



Your role will be to do the following:

1. Complete the entire residential appraisal report after the appraiser has provided you with the inspection information and comparables. This includes all the commentary, adjustments, and all other parts of the report. We will provide training on how we specifically expect the commentary and adjustments based on our own personal preferences, however you are expected to already have this type of experience working for other appraisers.

2. Review the work of other report writers on our team, provide feedback, and help train newer report writers on our team. You are expected to act as the "last line of defense" of the report before it is sent to the appraiser for their final review before submission. As such, we expect you to be able to review the report, find any issues, correct these issues, and then send to the appraiser a near perfect report.



To be considered for this role, you must meet the following criteria:

1. You have worked for a US residential appraiser

2. You have experience performing data entry for residential properties in the US

3. You have experience creating the 1004MC, selecting comparables, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, making adjustments to the sales grid, and making commentary for the addendum.

4. Ideally, you have experience managing other appraisal report writers.



If you don't have experience in writing commentary or the addendum, or do not have experience with making adjustments on the sales grid, we would still like to hear from you as we have a different job that would fit your experience better.



We are flexible with your work hours and offer Philippine daytime shift hours for your convenience. We would like to start part time but then transition to full time, so ideally you are open to working full time exclusively with us if its a mutual fit.



To be considered for this position, you must do the following in your application message (failure to do all of the following will result in your application being ignored):

1. How many years have you worked for a US residential appraiser? What tasks did you perform for them?

2. How many hours does it take you to complete one report? What parts of the report do you complete?

3. Do you have experience writing commentary for the addendum, drawing the sketch, labeling photos, and creating the 1004MC? Please indicate which ones you have experience with, and how many years for each.

4. Please provide a sample of at least one appraisal report you have fully completed. You can redact any private information from the report. Please let me know what parts exactly you completed on this report(s).

5. Provide a publicly accessible link to your resume.

6. Are you open to starting part time and then transitioning to full time? Once working full time with us, will you be working exclusively with us without any other jobs? When is the earliest you can begin working with us?

7. What are your preferred working hours?

8. Do you have experience managing other residential appraisal report writers? If so, please discuss in detail your job responsibilities.



Thank you, and I look forward to the opportunity to work together.

description:
Job Vacancy: Full-Time Customer Service Manager (Remote)



We are looking for a high-performance Customer Service Manager who takes full ownership of our entire customer service operation — from team management to systems, automation, and AI.



This is a hands-on operator role with full responsibility.



We already have an established customer service team handling 1,500–4,000 tickets per month.

We are now actively restructuring and upgrading our customer service operation, which is why this role exists.



Our goal is to optimize and scale everything using smarter systems, better processes, and our existing AI bot.

We are not looking for someone to assist — we are looking for someone to take control, improve, and rebuild where needed.



---



Your Role



* Take 100% ownership of the entire customer service department

* Lead and manage an existing team of agents

* Fully own and manage our AI customer service bot (optimization, training, performance)

* Improve and restructure workflows, systems, and team performance

* Work with tools like Gorgias and Returnless

* Ensure KPIs 



Important:



* You will combine management with hands-on ticket handling in the beginning

* This is intentional — you need to fully understand and take control of the operation

* As you optimize and scale, you will **transition into a fully management-focused role

* You work independently and report once per week (briefly)



---



What We’re Looking For



* Proven experience as a Customer Service Manager

* Experience leading and managing teams

* Strong sense of ownership and accountability

* Experience with Gorgias (Returnless is a plus)

* Experience managing or working with AI / automation in customer support

* Experience working with fulfillment centers

* Experience handling customer service in local languages

* Highly structured, proactive, and results-driven



---



What We Offer



* Full-time (remote)

* Salary: $1300 per month

* Full ownership and autonomy

* Direct impact on scaling and restructuring an active support operation

* Bonus if you're working for more then 6 months during a calender year





---



How to Apply

Full Stack Developer Job Description



Job Title: Full Stack Developer

About the Role

We are looking for a Full Stack Developer to build, improve, and maintain modern web applications from frontend to backend. You will work closely with product, design, and operations teams to ship features quickly, reliably, and securely.





Key Responsibilities

· Build and maintain frontend applications with responsive, accessible UI.



· Develop backend APIs, business logic, and database integrations.



· Design clean, scalable architecture and reusable components.



· Write secure, tested, and maintainable code.



· Optimize application performance, reliability, and developer workflows.



· Collaborate with cross-functional teams to plan and deliver features.



· Review code, mentor teammates, and improve engineering standards.





Required Skills & Experience

· 3+ years experience in full stack development.



· Strong JavaScript/TypeScript skills.



· Experience with a frontend framework (React/Next.js preferred).



· Experience with backend frameworks (Node.js, Python/Django).



· Solid understanding of REST APIs and authentication/authorization.



· Practical knowledge of SQL/relational databases.



· Experience with Git, CI/CD, and modern development workflows.



· Experience working in Agile development environments (sprint planning, task tracking, and iterative delivery).



· Solid understanding of SSDLC standards and secure development practices aligned with ISO 27001.

What Success Looks Like

title: Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist
description:
Job Title: Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time or Project-Based

Salary: Competitive, based on experience



About Wandering Lion



Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not sell disconnected marketing activity. We build structured systems across brand, performance, reporting, and operations so businesses can scale with more clarity, accountability, and control.



Our work sits at the intersection of strategy, execution, and systems. That means CRM setup, sales flow design, automation, and operational visibility are not back-end admin tasks. They are a core part of how growth becomes more predictable, measurable, and scalable.



About the Role



We are looking for a highly capable Zoho CRM & Automation Specialist to join Wandering Lion on either a project basis or in a longer-term role, depending on fit and capability.



This role is for someone with strong hands-on experience across the Zoho ecosystem, especially Zoho CRM, automations, integrations, and workflow design. We want someone who can help build and improve the systems behind lead flow, sales process management, reporting visibility, operational efficiency, and customer journey support.



This is not just a setup role. We want someone who can think commercially, understand how a sales funnel works, and design Zoho systems that support better lead handling, cleaner pipeline management, stronger automation, and more efficient internal processes.



Candidates should be able to demonstrate real experience through previous projects, relevant qualifications, and ideally Zoho certifications.



Key Responsibilities



Zoho CRM setup and optimisation

Build, customise, and improve Zoho CRM environments to support sales processes, lead management, reporting, and operational clarity.



Automation design and implementation

Develop and implement automations across Zoho applications to reduce manual work, improve speed, and create more reliable workflows.



Sales funnel and flow support

Design systems and automations that support lead capture, follow-up, deal stage movement, handover points, and sales visibility.



Integration and connected systems

Connect Zoho with forms, websites,
 tools, reporting systems, scheduling tools, and other relevant business platforms to create smoother data flow and more connected operations.



Zoho application configuration

Configure and customise Zoho tools based on business needs, including platforms such as Zoho CRM, Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, and other relevant Zoho products.



Testing and troubleshooting

Test workflows, identify system issues, and troubleshoot automation or integration problems to ensure reliability and performance.



Documentation and process support

Document automations, logic, workflows, and system structure clearly so internal teams can understand and use them effectively.



Training and guidance

Provide support, guidance, and practical training to tea
mbers on how to use Zoho systems and automations more effectively.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience as a Zoho CRM / Zoho Automation specialist

Strong hands-on capability across Zoho CRM and related Zoho applications

Deep experience building complex automations, workflows, and integrations

Ability to design systems around sales funnels, lead flow, pipeline management, and operational processes

Strong understanding of business process improvement and workflow efficiency

Ability to configure Zoho tools based on specific commercial and operational requirements

Strong problem-solving skills and attention to detail

Excellent communication and interpersonal skills

Ability to work independently, manage deadlines, and deliver clean, reliable implementation

Experience with other CRM, automation, or project management tools is an advantage

Preferred

Experience with Zoho Creator, Zoho Desk, Zoho Books, and broader Zoho suite tools

Relevant Zoho qualifications or certifications

Experience building systems for sales, service, reporting, or multi-step customer journeys

Familiarity with API connections, third-party integrations, and automation platforms

Experience supporting founder-led businesses, agencies, or service-based organisations

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Zoho systems are structured clearly and aligned to how the business actually works

Automations reduce manual work and improve consistency across lead and sales workflows

Pipeline visibility, reporting, and follow-up processes become clearer and more reliable

Tea
mbers are better supported by connected systems and cleaner process flow

CRM and automation setup contributes to smoother delivery, stronger accountability, and improved operational efficiency

Why Join Wandering Lion



You will be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, systems, and delivery under one roof.



That means:



You will help build systems that support real commercial outcomes

You will work inside a strategy-led environment, not a chaotic task-driven setup

You will contribute to clearer sales flow, stronger reporting, and more scalable operations

You will be part of a team that values honesty, accountability, and high standards

How to Apply



Please send:



your updated CV / resume

a short introduction about yourself

details of your Zoho experience, including the products you have worked in

examples of Zoho automations, integrations, or CRM systems you have built or improved

any relevant certifications, qualifications, or training

a 1-minute video introduction using this link: 
/wM6hDHzAkubBhs0zUq2p



Please note that only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for interview.



Before We Proceed



Before we potentially proceed to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a good fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1) PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specs, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. We need reliable performance and strong internet to support day-to-day work.



2) Current employment or side work (transparency request)

Are you currently employed or doing any side jobs or freelance work? We’re open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple jobs — what matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3) Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4) Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm (Philippines time). We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5) Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6) CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you haven’t already.



7) Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training certificates or courses you’ve completed.



8) English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we’re continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We’re looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



Thanks, and we look forward to your reply.

title: Junior Media Buyer
description:
We are looking for an analytical, fast-learning Junior Media Buyer to help manage and scale our advertising campaigns across Meta 
/Instagram) and TikTok. If you understand the basics of social media ads, love looking at data to see what’s working, and are ready to grow into a full-scale digital marketer, we want to hear from you.



This is a part-time role (20 hours per week) with the potential to grow to full-time based on performance.



Responsibilities

Campaign Management: Assist in setting up, launching, and monitoring ad campaigns on Meta Ads Manager and TikTok Ads Manager.



Performance Tracking: Monitor daily spend and key metrics (ROAS, CPA, CTR) to ensure budgets are on track.



Creative Analysis: Work with our creative team to identify which videos/images are performing best and suggest new "hooks" or angles.



Reporting: Prepare weekly performance reports to show what’s working and where we can improve.



Optimization: Perform basic audience testing, A/B testing, and budget adjustments under the guidance of the Senior Media Buyer.



Organization: Keep tracking links, naming conventions, and project files neatly organized.



Requirements

Platform Knowledge: Basic experience navigating Meta Ads Manager (TikTok Ads experience is a huge plus).



Analytical Mindset: You should be comfortable with numbers and basic Excel/Google Sheets.



Speed & Diligence: Ability to move fast and double-check settings to ensure no budget is wasted.



English Proficiency: Excellent English comprehension to follow complex creative briefs and platform policies.



Growth Potential: A massive desire to learn the "science" of digital advertising.



Nice-to-Have

Experience with UGC-style content or understanding what makes a video go viral.



Familiarity with Google Analytics or third-party tracking tools.



Previous experience in E-commerce or Lead Gen niches.



Knowledge of AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude) to help with ad copywriting.



Compensation & Schedule

Role: Part-time (20 hours per week)



Rate: $5 USD per hour



Schedule: You must be available to overlap with AU Time Zone (AEST/AEDT) for team syncs and quick task turnarounds.

title: Credit Repair / Credit Building Specialist.
description:

We are looking for an experienced Credit Repair Specialist to help improve credit scores by reviewing credit reports, identifying errors, disputing inaccurate items, and creating a credit-building strategy.

Organized and detail-oriented

Good communication skills

Your credit repair experience

Tools/software you have used

Your expected hourly rate



Use the link:

title: Sales , Meta Ads Gen , Admin
description:
Remote Growth, Sales & Patient Care Coordinator

(Meta Ads, Lead Generation, Lead Conversion, Admin & ADHD Screening Support)



Updated Job Overview



iNeuron ADHD Clinic is looking for a proactive remote team member who can support clinic growth through a combination of:



Meta ads management and lead generation

sales and lead conversion

patient administration

screening calls using ADHD questionnaires

appointment booking and scheduling



This is a hybrid marketing + sales + admin + patient coordination role. The person will be responsible not only for following up leads, but also for helping create, manage, and optimise
 and Instagram ad campaigns to generate high-quality enquiries for ADHD assessments and related clinic services.



Updated Key Responsibilities

1. Meta Ads Management and Lead Generation

Create, launch, and manage Meta ads campaigns on
 and Instagram

Set up lead generation campaigns, conversion campaigns, retargeting campaigns, and awareness campaigns where needed

Write ad copy, headlines, and calls to action suitable for ADHD clinic services

Coordinate or create basic ad creatives such as images, carousels, simple videos, and promotional graphics

Monitor ad performance including:

cost per lead

click-through rate

conversion rate

quality of leads

Test different audiences, ad creatives, hooks, and messaging

Optimise campaigns based on results to improve booking conversion and reduce cost per lead

Install or manage Meta Pixel, events, and lead tracking where relevant

Report weekly on ad performance and recommendations

Work closely with the clinic owner to align ads with services, target audience, and business goals

2. Sales and Lead Conversion

Contact new leads generated from Meta ads, website forms, WhatsApp, or other campaigns

Call leads promptly and convert them into booked screening calls or assessment appointments

Explain the clinic’s ADHD assessment process, pricing, and next steps clearly and professionally

Use phone, WhatsApp, SMS, and
 to follow up potential clients

Manage lead pipelines and ensure no warm lead is missed

Follow up unconverted leads consistently and professionally

Handle common objections and encourage appropriate leads to proceed to booking

3. ADHD Screening Calls and Pre-Booking Support

Conduct structured screening calls with potential patients or parents before booking

Use clinic questionnaires, scripts, and ADHD screening tools to gather relevant background information

Ask screening questions clearly, sensitively, and professionally

Identify whether the enquiry appears suitable for the clinic’s ADHD assessment pathway

Ensure screening data is documented accurately for clinician review

Flag any complex, urgent, or clinical concerns to the clinician

Support collection of questionnaires and pre-assessment documentation

4. Administration and Appointment Scheduling

Book consultations, screening calls, and assessment appointments

Coordinate calendar scheduling and appointment confirmations

Send forms, questionnaires, invoices, payment links, and reminders

Follow up incomplete forms and missing documents

Keep lead trackers, booking records, and patient admin systems updated

Reschedule appointments where needed

Help maintain a smooth patient journey from first enquiry to confirmed booking

Ideal Candidate



We are looking for someone who:



has hands-on experience running Meta ads

understands lead generation and sales conversion

is confident making phone calls and following up leads

can handle clinic admin and scheduling

is organised, responsive, and good with detail

communicates warmly and professionally with patients

can use structured screening forms and scripts

is comfortable working independently in a remote role

Preferred Skills and Experience

Experience running
 and Instagram ads

Experience in lead generation for clinics, healthcare, coaching, education, or service businesses

Experience in telesales, appointment setting, or patient coordination

Familiarity with ADHD or mental health services

Experience using CRM systems, spreadsheets, booking software, and WhatsApp Business

Ability to write basic marketing copy and improve follow-up scripts

Strong admin and organisational ability

Important Boundaries



This role includes marketing and non-clinical patient support, but does not include:



diagnosing ADHD

giving medical advice

making clinical decisions

providing therapy or treatment recommendations



Any clinical concerns must be referred to the clinician.



KPIs

Number of leads generated from Meta ads

Cost per lead

Speed of lead response

Number of calls made

Number of screening calls completed

Booking conversion rate

Show-up rate for appointments

Admin accuracy and follow-up completion

title: Urgent Appointment Setter

title: Short form (video Editing)
description:
Short-Form Video Editor: Create Winning Ads for a Scaling Swedish E-Com Brand ($15–25/hr, Remote Part-Time ? Full-Time)



We are a fast-growing Swedish eCommerce brand helping products scale from early traction to serious revenue using high-performance creatives.



We don’t create content for likes — we create ads that convert.



Our creatives dominate TikTok, Instagram and
, and now we’re looking for a short-form video editor from the Philippines who can turn raw ideas into revenue-generating ads.



The Role



As our video editor, you’ll execute structured creative briefs from our team and turn them into high-performing short-form ads (15–60 seconds).



You’ll be working with a consistent flow of content, typically handling 5–10 briefs per week, while also iterating on winning creatives to scale performance.



You’ll upload and organize assets in Google Drive, collaborate closely with our team through Slack, and implement feedback fast.



Over time, this role evolves beyond editing — you’ll start understanding what works, analyzing creatives, and becoming a key part of scaling winning ads.



What You’ll Do



You’ll edit high-performing creatives including UGC-style videos, product demos and testimonials, all with strong hooks, fast pacing and clean structure.



You’ll organize and upload content in structured Drive folders, keep communication tight and efficient, and respond quickly with revisions and updated versions.



You’ll also help iterate on winning creatives and continuously improve output based on what performs.



Who We’re Looking For



We’re looking for someone who already knows how short-form content works.



You should be comfortable using CapCut, Premiere Pro or After Effects, and have experience with TikTok, Reels or
 ads.



Experience with eCommerce is a big advantage, especially if you understand hooks, retention, desire triggers and call to actions.



You are reliable, organized, fast, and have a strong growth mindset.



Most importantly, you don’t just follow instructions — you think, improve and execute at a high level.



Pay & Growth



This is a remote role starting part-time (10–20 hours per week) with clear potential to grow into full-time.



Compensation is between $15–25 per hour depending on your level.



We also offer performance-based bonuses for creatives that scale.



You’ll be working in a fast-moving environment with consistent workload and real opportunity to grow.



How to Apply



Send us your portfolio with examples of short-form ads, preferably within eCommerce, along with your hourly rate and turnaround time.



To confirm that you’ve read the full job description, include the word “apple” in your application.



Shortlisted candidates will receive a sample brief to complete.



PS



Bad execution kills great ideas.



Great editors scale businesses.



Be one of them.

title: Case Manager

, chat, and video calls

, CRM systems, and online tools

title: TikTok Media Buyer/VA
description:
TikTok Media Buyers Needed – Digital Products / Sweeps / Rewards (Hiring 3)

Looking for 3 experienced TikTok media buyers to join my team and run campaigns at volume for digital product offers (sweeps, rewards, similar verticals). This is a churn-and-burn operation at high volume and scale.



What you'll be doing:



Launching and managing high-volume TikTok ad campaigns for digital product offers

Working within TikTok Business Centers — managing accounts, assets, and permissions across multiple ad accounts

Whitelisting creatives and understanding the process for getting ads approved and running in restricted verticals

Monitoring performance and making daily optimizations — turning adgroups on/off based on key metrics

Handling ad account suspensions, disapprovals, and replacements as part of normal workflow

Coordinating with the rest of the media buying team (2 other buyers) to share learnings, flag issues, and solve problems fast

Reporting on campaign performance (spend, ROAS, CPA, etc.)



What we're looking for:



Direct experience buying media for digital product offers — sweeps, rewards, and similar verticals. If your background is ecommerce, dropshipping, or brand advertising, this is not the role for you.

Comfortable operating in a churn-and-burn environment — you understand that account suspensions and ad disapprovals are part of the game, not a crisis.

Strong understanding of TikTok Business Center structure, whitelisting processes, and how to keep campaigns live

Solid grasp of core metrics: ROAS, CPA, CPM, CTR, and how to use them to make real-time optimization decisions

A team player — you'll be one of three buyers running separate campaigns in parallel, so communication and coordination are essential

Available to start within the next few days



Details:



Part-time position

$3.50–$4.00/hr USD

Some overlap with US hours required (we'll work out a schedule)

Training and SOPs will be provided, but you need to come in with a working understanding of TikTok media buying in this space

Long-term role with room to grow into more responsibility and higher pay as you prove yourself



How to apply:

Tell me about your experience buying media specifically for digital product offers (sweeps, rewards, etc.) on TikTok. Include what kinds of daily budgets you've managed, how you've handled account suspensions and whitelisting, and how comfortable you are navigating TikTok Business Center.

title: Lead Generation VA for Local Business Prospecting
description:
We are looking for a detail-oriented VA to help us build targeted lead lists for our AI receptionist company.



Your job is to find local service businesses that are good prospects for our offer.



We are mainly looking for businesses that:



* do not have a website, have a weak website, or only use social media

* likely do not use modern automation or an AI receptionist

* appear to be active and still getting customers



You will be responsible for gathering accurate lead information for cold calling and outreach.



For each lead, we want:



* Company name

* Owner name if available

* Primary phone number

* Secondary phone number if available

*
 address

* Business address

* Website link or note if no website

*
 or social media link if available

* Notes on why the lead looks active

* Recent review date or sign of recent activity



Important:

We do NOT expect you to prove with certainty that a business does not have an AI receptionist. We want you to find businesses that are likely low-tech and likely good prospects based on their online presence.



We also want businesses that seem active, such as:



* recent reviews

* recent posts

* open business profile

* active phone number

* signs they are still serving customers



Requirements:



* good English

* strong web research skills

* attention to detail

* able to follow lead criteria carefully

* able to organize leads clearly in Google Sheets or Excel



This will start with a paid test batch of 25 to 50 leads. If the quality is good, we will continue with a larger batch of around 300 leads.



Please apply with:



* your experience with lead generation

* examples of similar work if available

* how you would find and verify these types of leads

* how many leads you can produce per hour with good quality
