title: Website Demo Creator — AI-Powered Landing Pages ($0.25/Demo + $20 Bonuses, Flexible Hours)
description:
Website Demo Creator — AI-Powered Landing Pages



$0.25 Per Approved Demo + $20 Bonus Per Client Conversion



Flexible Hours | Work From Home | Earn While You Learn



== WHO WE ARE ==

PT Presence is a fast-growing UK digital agency that builds premium, AI-powered websites for personal trainers. We create stunning demo websites that showcase what a PT's online presence could look like — then offer it as a paid service.

We're scaling rapidly and building a small team of detail-oriented people to help us produce demos at volume. This is real, consistent work with a clear process.



==  WHY JOIN NOW — GROUND FLOOR OPPORTUNITY ==

This isn't just task work. We're building something real. The people who join now in Phase 1 and prove themselves will be FIRST in line for:



* Team Lead roles managing new VAs as we scale to 8–12 people

* Higher fixed-rate monthly pay

* A genuine career path with a growing international agency



We're looking for 2–3 people right now. If you're reliable and detail-oriented, this is your chance to grow with us from the start.



== WHAT YOU'LL DO (STEP BY STEP) ==

Every demo follows the exact same process. You'll be trained on each step with video walkthroughs. No guesswork.



Open our tracking spreadsheet and claim your next batch of personal trainers

Research the PT: visit their gym profile page, find their Instagram, save their photos and bio info

Open our AI tool and paste our pre-written master prompt along with the PT's details and photos — the AI builds the entire website. You don't write or design anything.

Download the completed HTML file, rename it, and upload to Google Drive

Prepare a companion PDF using a template (fill in yellow fields, export as PDF)

Update 6–8 columns in the tracking spreadsheet (dates, links, status)

Flag the completed demo for manager review and move to your next lead



That's it. Once trained, each demo takes approximately 20 minutes. The AI does the heavy lifting. You manage the inputs, quality-check the output, and keep the spreadsheet updated. If it takes longer it won't be because of more work — just waiting for the AI to finish generating.



== HOW MUCH YOU'LL EARN ==

Every approved demo = $0.25 USD

Every client conversion from YOUR demo = $20 USD bonus (no cap)



Here's what that looks like:

* 25 demos/week (minimum target) = $6.25/week = $25/month base + $20–100 in bonuses = $45–125/month

* 35 demos/week (strong performer) = $8.75/week = $35/month base + $20–100 in bonuses = $55–135/month

* 50 demos/week (top performer) = $12.50/week = $50/month base + $20–100+ in bonuses = $70–150+/month

No daily minimum. Hit 25/week however you like — batch them all on Monday and Tuesday if you want. Work evenings, weekends, early mornings. Your schedule, your choice.

The faster and more accurate you get, the more you earn. No cap on output.



Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise (1st and 15th). Fast, reliable, low fees.



== WHY THIS ROLE IS GREAT ==

* Everything is systematised. Step-by-step SOP with video training. Follow the process, get paid.

* No coding or design skills needed. The AI builds the website. You manage the process.

* Truly flexible schedule. 25/week minimum (Sun–Sat). Do them whenever suits you.

* Earn more by doing more. No cap. Faster workers who maintain quality earn more.

* $20 conversion bonuses. When your demo converts to a paying client, you earn extra. No limit.

* Career growth. Top performers in months 1–3 become team leads at higher fixed pay.

* Learn in-demand AI skills. You'll become proficient with AI tools — increasingly valuable in the VA market.



== REQUIREMENTS ==

MUST HAVE:

* Good written English — you'll read trainer bios and check AI output for errors. Must be clean and accurate.

* Reliable internet and computer — you'll use browser-based AI tools and Google Workspace.

* Detail-oriented — correct spelling of names, accurate data entry, proper file naming. This is the #1 skill for this role.

* Google Sheets + Google Drive competency — basic skills, nothing advanced.

* Self-motivated — manage your own time and hit weekly targets without daily supervision.

* Willing to sign an NDA — our process is proprietary. Standard confidentiality agreement.



NICE TO HAVE (not required):

* Experience with AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, etc.)

* Basic HTML knowledge (helpful for quality-checking, not needed to do the job)

* Previous VA, data entry, or lead generation experience



==  PAID SCREENING TASK — YOU MUST COMPLETE THIS TO BE CONSIDERED ==

* Applications without this completed task will be automatically rejected. No exceptions.

This should take 15–20 minutes. I will pay $1 USD to everyone who completes it properly — even if I don't hire you. This step is really important for us to assess fit, and we respect your time by paying for it.



PART 1 — Find a personal trainer (5 mins)

Go to this page: 

Pick ANY one personal trainer listed on that page.

Copy and paste: their full name, their qualifications, and their bio text (2–3 sentences from the profile).



PART 2 — Find their Instagram (3 mins)

Search Instagram for the PT you chose. Find their profile.

Paste their Instagram URL.

If you can't find them after 5 minutes, write: "Not found — searched [list the terms you used]"



PART 3 — Attention to detail check (2 mins)

Answer these three questions:



What is 25 demos × $0.25?

What is the bonus amount per client conversion?

What is the minimum number of demos per week?



PART 4 — Written communication (5 mins)

Write 3–4 sentences introducing the PT you chose as if you were writing the opening paragraph of their website. Make it sound professional and engaging — like you're selling their personal training services to a potential gy
mber. Use information from their actual bio.



PART 5 — About you (3 mins)

In 3–4 sentences, tell me:

* Your experience with detail-oriented, repetitive tasks

* Your internet speed (screenshot appreciated but not required)

* How many hours per week you're available

* When you could start



HOW TO SUBMIT:

Send your answers as a Google Doc link or Word file attached to your application.



Label the file: [YourName]_PT_Presence_Task

Example: JuanDelaCruz_PT_Presence_Task



== WHY THIS TASK MATTERS ==

This task mirrors the actual job. If you can research a PT, find their Instagram, write engaging copy about them, and follow instructions precisely — you will excel in this role.

I'm looking for people who READ CAREFULLY and DELIVER ACCURATELY. That's the whole job.

You are welcome to use ChatGPT, Claude, or any other AI tool to help you — this is encouraged and mirrors how the actual work is done.



== QUICK SUMMARY ==

* Pay: $0.25 per approved demo + $20 per conversion

* Target: 25 demos/week minimum (flexible schedule)

* Expected earnings: $45–150+/month depending on output and conversions

* Hours: 10–20 hrs/week, work whenever you want

* Training: Provided (video walkthroughs + written SOPs)

* Tools: AI tool account provided, Google Workspace

* Payment: Bi-weekly via Wise

* Growth: Team lead opportunities as we scale

* Start: Immediately after training



I'm excited to find the right people to build this with. If you're reliable, detail-oriented, and hungry to grow — apply now and complete the screening task. Looking forward to reading your submission.

title: Female executive assistant to the CEO
description:
We are seeking a highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented Virtual Executive Assistant to support the CEO in managing day-to-day operations, strategic initiatives, and personal tasks. This is a fully remote role, ideal for someone who thrives in a fast-paced environment and has a passion for helping a growing business succeed. As the right-hand person to the CEO, you’ll play a key role in streamlining workflows, enhancing productivity, and ensuring seamless communication across teams and clients in the landscaping and home services industry.



Key Responsibilities:

•  Manage the CEO’s calendar, including scheduling meetings, appointments, and travel arrangements, while prioritizing tasks and resolving conflicts.

•  Handle
 correspondence, draft responses, and filter communications to ensure the CEO focuses on high-priority matters.

•  Coordinate with internal teams (e.g., field operations, sales, and finance) and external vendors or clients, particularly for project bids, client follow-ups, and service inquiries.

•  Prepare reports, presentations, and documents related to business performance, such as client proposals, budget summaries, or seasonal planning for landscaping projects.

•  Conduct research on industry trends, competitors, suppliers (e.g., equipment or materials for home services), and potential business opportunities.

•  Assist with preparing quotes for services and following up with clients to ensure satisfaction and secure repeat business.

•  Assist with personal errands and administrative tasks as needed, ensuring a balanced work-life integration for the CEO.

•  Track expenses, manage invoicing, and support basic bookkeeping using tools like QuickBooks or Google Workspace.

•  Organize virtual meetings via Zoom or similar platforms, including agenda preparation and follow-up notes.

•  Handle confidential information with the utmost discretion and professionalism.

title: Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) — US Mortgage | Remote
description:
JOB TITLE: Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) — US Mortgage | Remote

COMPANY: One of the Fastest-Growing Mortgage Brokers in the United States

LOCATION: 100% Remote — Work from Home (Philippines)

SCHEDULE: Full-Time | Monday–Friday | 8:00 AM–5:00 PM PST (11:00 PM–8:00 AM PHT)

COMPENSATION: PHP 35,000–65,000/month depending on experience

TYPE: Full-Time | Long-Term | Immediate Start



---



ABOUT THE COMPANY



We are one of the fastest-growing mortgage brokerage brands in the United States. We specialize in home loans, refinancing, HELOC, DSCR investor loans, and non-traditional mortgage products across multiple US states. Our team is lean, fast-moving, and performance-driven — and we are building our remote operations team in the Philippines.



This is a ground-floor opportunity to grow with a US-based mortgage company that is scaling aggressively. We invest in our people, provide full training, and promote from within.



---



ABOUT THE ROLE



We are looking for a highly organized, detail-oriented Loan Officer Assistant (LOA) to support our US-based loan officers from application through closing. You will be the backbone of our loan pipeline — keeping files moving, borrowers informed, and our team focused on closing deals.



This is not a call center job. This is a professional operations role with real career growth potential in the US mortgage industry.



---



WHAT YOU'LL DO



- Collect, organize, and verify borrower documents (income, assets, ID, disclosures)

- Follow up with borrowers via phone,
, and text to keep files moving

- Build clean, complete loan files ready for processing and submission

- Update CRM (Go High Level) with accurate notes and task management

- Coordinate with processors, title companies, escrow officers, and clients

- Assist with AUS findings and pre-qualification workflows (training provided)

- Prepare files for submission and assist with clearing basic loan conditions

- Deliver a professional, high-touch borrower experience on every file

- Attend daily team check-ins via Zoom or Google Meet



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Required:

- Excellent written and spoken English — you will communicate directly with US clients

- Strong attention to detail — errors in mortgage files cost time and money

- Highly organized with the ability to manage multiple files simultaneously

- Reliable high-speed internet connection and quiet work environment

- Self-managed, proactive, and able to work independently

- Comfortable with CRM tools, Google Workspace, and cloud-based systems



Strong Bonus (not required — we will train the right person):

- Previous experience in US mortgage processing, LOA, or loan support

- Knowledge of US mortgage terms (DTI, LTV, AUS, DU/LP, underwriting)

- Experience with Go High Level, Encompass, or similar LOS/CRM platforms

- Background in banking, lending, real estate, or financial services

- Experience working with US-based clients or companies



Not a Fit If:

- You struggle with fast-paced, deadline-driven environments

- You need constant supervision and direction

- You are not comfortable communicating with US clients by phone or

- You have frequent internet or power outages with no backup solution



---



COMPENSATION & BENEFITS



Starting Pay: PHP 35,000–65,000/month based on experience

Performance Bonuses: Additional bonuses tied to closed loan volume

Paid Training: Full onboarding and US mortgage industry training provided

Equipment Allowance: Available for long-term hires

Career Growth: Top performers promoted to Senior LOA, Loan Processor, or Jr. Loan Officer track

PTO: Paid time off after probationary period

US Holidays observed + select Philippine holidays

Long-term, stable position — we don't hire and rotate



---



WHY THIS ROLE STANDS OUT



- Work directly with a US mortgage team — real exposure, real experience

- No middleman agency — you are hired directly by the company

- Clear performance metrics — you always know how you're doing

- Grow into a specialist in one of the most in-demand financial fields in the US

- Be part of a team scaling toward $10M+/month in loan volume

- Your work directly impacts real American families buying homes and building wealth



---



HOW TO APPLY



Step 1: Complete our short personality and work style assessment (5–8 minutes). This is required — it helps us understand how you think and work before we schedule an interview:



???? 
lify.app



Step 2: Send your resume/CV to 



Subject line: LOA Application PH — [Your Name]



Step 3: In the body of your
, include:

- Your English proficiency level (conversational / professional / native-level)

- A 30 second video of yourself speaking on why we should pick you for this position

- Any mortgage or financial services experience you have

- Your internet speed and backup plan for outages

- Your available start date



Applications submitted without completing the personality assessment will not be reviewed.



We respond to all complete applications within 48–72 hours.



---



IMPORTANT NOTES



- This role requires PST business hours (night shift in the Philippines). Please only apply if you are comfortable with and committed to this schedule.

- This is a direct hire — no agency fees, no third-party recruiters.

- We are looking for someone who wants to grow with us long-term, not just fill a contract.

- A short video or voice introduction is a bonus but not required.

title: Acquisition Manager  – Remote ($5hr, Up to $800 monthly, $20 bonues, plus commission)
description:
Schedule (Starting)

	•	Wednesdays and Thursdays

	•	2 hours per day (4 hours/week)

	•	Calling US sellers (must be comfortable speaking on the phone)



?



Performance-Based Hours Increases (Automatic)



Hours can increase automatically based on results:

	•	Step 1 – Increase to 10 hours/week:

If you secure 2 executed purchase contracts at/below MAO within any rolling 30-day period, your schedule will automatically increase to 10 hours per week (as long as lead volume supports it).

	•	Step 2 – Increase to 40 hours/week (Full-Time):

If you secure 3 executed purchase contracts within any rolling 30-day period, your schedule will automatically increase to 40 hours per week, based on performance and lead volume.



Notes:

	•	“At/below MAO” means the final signed purchase price is at or below the MAO calculated using our comp/underwriting guidelines.

	•	Hours increases depend on consistent performance, communication, and available lead flow.



?



Pay

	•	$5/hour base

	•	$20 per signed contract

	•	Commission: 6% of the assignment fee (paid on closed/collected deals)



?



Job Overview



We are hiring a closing-focused Acquisition Manager to call motivated seller leads, run comps, present offers, negotiate, and get purchase contracts signed for our real estate wholesaling business.



?



What You Will Do

	•	Call warm/hot seller leads and follow up consistently

	•	Qualify sellers: motivation, timeline, condition, price

	•	Run property comps (market value) to support offer pricing

	•	Present offers clearly and professionally

	•	Negotiate and handle objections

	•	Get purchase contracts signed (DocuSign or similar)

	•	Update notes and lead statuses in our tracking system

	•	Coordinate handoff after signing (next steps with the team)



?

title: ZION — Autonomous Dev Agent System
description:
1. What You Are Building

An autonomous development agent system running on a dedicated VPS. The system consists of two components: EVA (the conversational interface) and ZION (the orchestration layer that directs Claude Code workers to execute development tasks).



I interact with EVA via 
 and
. EVA translates my requests into structured tasks and passes them to ZION. ZION assigns tasks to Claude Code workers. Workers execute and report back. EVA communicates results to me.



SCOPE

You are building EVA and ZION only. Claude Code is an existing tool you will install and wire up. You are not building any downstream applications — ZION will build those after handoff.







2. How It Works

Component

Role

EVA

Conversational AI interface. Listens on 
 and
. Translates my requests into structured task briefs. Passes briefs to ZION. Receives results and escalations from ZION. Communicates with me. Archives all conversations as .md files on the VPS.

ZION

Orchestrator. Receives briefs from EVA. Manages task queue. Assigns tasks to Claude Code workers in sequence. Halts on failure. Reports blockers back to EVA. That is all ZION does.

Claude Code workers

Execution layer. Called by ZION. Each worker performs one task. Returns output or failure to ZION.



COMMUNICATION RULE

ZION never contacts me directly. ZION never posts to 
. EVA is the only entity that communicates with me or posts to 
 channels.







3. Non-Negotiables

You have latitude on implementation approach with two hard exceptions.



3.1 ZION is a pure orchestrator

ZION coordinates workers. ZION does not perform computation, transform data, validate business logic, repair errors, retry silently, or contain fallback logic. If ZION does any of these things it becomes unmaintainable. This is the most common mistake and it will not be accepted.



SIMPLE TEST

If ZION were removed from the system, no business logic should be lost. Only coordination is lost. If removing ZION breaks logic, ZION was doing too much.



3.2 Single responsibility workers

Each Claude Code worker does one thing. A worker that reads data is not the same worker that processes it. A worker that processes data is not the same worker that writes it. Single responsibility means a failure is always isolated to one worker. The blast radius never cascades.







4. EVA Specification

    • 
 listener — receives planning sessions and longer context tasks

    •
 bot — receives mobile messages, sends roadblock notifications and SOP alerts to me

    • Generates structured task briefs and passes to ZION

    • Receives escalations from ZION, attempts to resolve using known context before pinging me

    • Posts project updates to correct 
 channels — EVA only, never ZION

    • Saves every conversation as a .md file to /opt/devagent/conversations/ with topic-based filename

    • Manages the SOP decision engine (see Section 6)







5. ZION Specification

    • Pure Python orchestrator — no n8n, no Zapier, no low-code tools

    • Receives structured briefs from EVA

    • Maintains independent task queue per project

    • Calls Claude Code workers non-interactively in defined sequence

    • Respects task dependencies — does not run step 3 before step 2 is complete

    • Halts on worker failure — no silent retry, no self-repair

    • Reports failure to EVA with enough context for EVA to escalate or resolve

    • Returns deterministic exit state on completion







6. SOP Decision Engine

EVA manages a decision engine that learns my preferences over time and reduces how often I need to be interrupted.



    • Every decision I make is logged as PENDING with vote count 1

    • Same decision type resolved the same way — vote count increments

    • Three consistent votes promotes the decision to a standing rule (SOP)

    • On promotion EVA sends
: “New SOP: [rule]. Reply REVOKE to cancel.”

    • Conflicting resolution before 3 votes — votes reset, EVA sends
: “Conflicting decisions on [type]. Reply ALWAYS, NEVER, or SKIP.”

    • REVOKE command deletes any standing rule







7. Accounts & Credentials

Service

Requirement

Google Workspace


 — register all agent services under this

 Bot

Created 
 in .env only. Never hardcoded.


 Bot

New token for EVA. Separate from existing Profe bots.

Claude API

Key provided by me. Connected to Claude Code and EVA.

GitHub

New account under claude@
. All code committed. I receive access on handoff.







8. VPS & Deployment

    • IONOS VPS — 8 vCores, 16 GB RAM, 480 GB NVMe, Ubuntu

    • New installation at /opt/devagent — isolated from everything else on the server

    • EVA and ZION run as systemd services with auto-restart on failure

    • Claude Code installed globally and callable non-interactively

    • All credentials in .env files — nothing hardcoded



DO NOT TOUCH

/opt/openclaw — existing customer-facing bots. You have no authorization to access, read, or modify anything in this directory.







9. Acceptance Criteria

Item

Pass Condition

Claude Code

Installed globally, callable non-interactively by ZION, test task executes cleanly

ZION

Pure orchestrator, no business logic, single failure does not cascade, task queue works

EVA — 

Receives messages, generates briefs, passes to ZION, posts to correct channels

EVA —

Receives messages, sends notifications, REVOKE command works

SOP engine

3-vote promotion works, conflict detection fires, REVOKE deletes rule

Conversation archiving

Every conversation saved as .md with topic-based filename

Systemd services

Both services auto-restart, survive server reboot

End to end test

Task sent via
 flows EVA ? ZION ? Claude Code ? result back to EVA ? posted to 

Handoff document

All credentials, file paths, service commands, restart procedures documented







10. Before You Apply

Answer these two questions. They tell me whether you read this brief.



    • In your own words: what is ZION's job and what is it explicitly not allowed to do?

    • This build is pure Python on a Linux VPS. No low-code tools anywhere in EVA or ZION. Are you comfortable with that and what similar Python systems have you built?





Jaimi M. Saunders, PhD  |  Fidelis Consulting & Training LLC

title: OWCP / TRICARE / Noridian Billing Specialist with DME Experience $5/hour
description:
We are hiring an experienced OWCP / TRICARE / Noridian Billing Specialist with DME Experience for a long-term independent contractor opportunity.



You must have 5+ years of direct US healthcare billing experience handling claims, payer follow-up, denial review, account resolution, and payer communication. Direct experience billing OWCP, TRICARE, and Noridian is required. Experience working with DME billing is strongly preferred.



This is not an entry-level role and this is not a training position. If you do not have real, hands-on experience with US medical billing workflows, payer rules, and claims follow-up, please do not apply.



You must be confident with:

• Billing and claims submission for OWCP, TRICARE, and Noridian

• Reviewing claim status, payment outcomes, denials, rejections, and underpayments

• Working AR and following up on unpaid, delayed, or incorrectly processed claims

• Identifying billing issues and correcting claim errors before resubmission

• Understanding payer-specific rules, filing requirements, and reimbursement guidelines

• Handling DME billing workflows and payer-specific DME requirements

• Reviewing authorizations, referrals, documentation, and medical necessity requirements

• Identifying missing documentation and resolving claim holds or development requests

• Communicating professionally with US insurance companies and payer representatives

• Documenting billing activity accurately and completely in EMR, PM, and internal systems

• Working in payer portals, clearinghouses, EMR, and practice management systems

• Coordinating with intake, authorization, clinical, and billing tea
mbers to prevent delays, denials, and lost revenue



This is a remote role working closely with a husband-and-wife team. We are looking for someone professional, dependable, detail-oriented, and comfortable working independently.



Compensation:

• $5/hour



Schedule:

• Monday through Friday

• 9:00 AM to 7:00 PM EST

• 30-minute unpaid break at 1:30 PM EST

• Some weekends required when workload requires it



Requirements:

• 5+ years of direct US healthcare billing, AR, claims follow-up, or revenue cycle experience

• Strong OWCP / TRICARE / Noridian billing experience required

• DME billing experience strongly preferred

• Strong English communication

• Comfortable using RingCentral

• Comfortable working through a remote PC / remote desktop

• Reliable internet and a professional home office

• Available during the required hours



Hiring requirements:

• Smile Checks background screening

• Criminal background verification

• Reference verification

• Contractor onboarding and agreement through Deel



Long-term opportunity:

This is a long-term independent contractor opportunity. We are looking to build an ongoing working relationship with the right person for as long as the arrangement continues to be a good fit for both sides.



Do not apply if:

• You do not have 5+ years of direct US healthcare billing, claims follow-up, AR, or related experience

• You do not have strong hands-on billing experience with OWCP, TRICARE, and Noridian

• Your background is mainly admin, VA, customer service, or coursework only

• You need training on medical billing basics



To apply, include:

	1.	Total years of US healthcare billing / revenue cycle experience

	2.	Total years billing OWCP, TRICARE, and Noridian

	3.	Total years handling DME billing

	4.	Specialties supported

	5.	EMR / PM / clearinghouse / payer portal systems used

	6.	A short explanation of how you work claims, resolve denials, and identify payer-specific billing issues

	7.	Resume

	8.	Voice recording in English

	9.	Confirmation that you are comfortable with Smile Checks, Deel, RingCentral, remote PC work, the required schedule, and working with a husband-and-wife team



Required first line of application:

I have 5+ years of direct US healthcare billing experience with strong OWCP, TRICARE, and Noridian billing experience.

title: HubSpot Marketing Automation Specialist — MSP / B2B Tech
description:
HubSpot Marketing Automation Specialist — MSP / B2B Tech

Part-Time · 15–20 hrs/wk

·

Long-Term Contract

·

Remote

HubSpot Certified Marketing Automation B2B / MSP CRM n8n / Zapier

ABOUT THE COMPANY



Capital Techies is a 20-year-old Managed IT Services Provider (MSP) headquartered in Fairfax, Virginia, serving the Washington DC metro area. We provide managed IT, cybersecurity, Microsoft 365 management, AV/conferencing solutions, and structured cabling to nonprofits, healthcare organizations, federal contractors, real estate firms, and SMBs. We're scaling aggressively and need a HubSpot expert to help build our marketing and sales engine from the ground up.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

Build and maintain HubSpot marketing automation workflows — lead nurture sequences, deal stage triggers, lifecycle management, re-engagement campaigns

Design and publish high-converting landing pages for lead magnets (cybersecurity assessments, vertical-specific offers for nonprofit, healthcare, GovCon)

Set up and optimize
 sequences — cold outreach, drip campaigns, monthly newsletters by ICP vertical

Maintain CRM hygiene — deduplication, lifecycle stage mapping, pipeline management across 12 ICP profiles

Build custom reports and dashboards — MRR pipeline, lead source attribution, campaign ROI, rep activity

Manage HubSpot integrations with ConnectWise (PSA), 
 (prospecting), and n8n (workflow automation)

Implement SEO best practices in HubSpot CMS — metadata, CTAs, blog publishing, internal linking

Support paid ad tracking — Google Ads and LinkedIn campaign UTM setup, conversion tracking, attribution reporting

Advise on new HubSpot features and AI tools as they roll out — we expect you to stay ahead of the curve

REQUIREMENTS — NON-NEGOTIABLE

Active HubSpot Marketing Hub Certification (must provide certificate links)

Active HubSpot Sales Hub Certification

Active HubSpot Reporting Certification

3+ years hands-on HubSpot experience — not just familiarity

Proven experience building automation workflows (sequences, enrollment triggers, branching logic)

Strong English communication — async-first team, you'll write briefs, loom updates, and Slack messages

Portfolio of landing pages and workflows you've personally built

NICE TO HAVE

HubSpot CMS Developer or Partner Certification

Experience with B2B tech companies, SaaS, or MSPs

Familiarity with 
, n8n, Zapier, or Make (Integromat)

Google Ads / LinkedIn Ads campaign management

ConnectWise or similar PSA/ticketing system exposure

RATE

Compensation is competitive and commensurate with experience. We pay top rates for top talent — if you're certified, skilled, and can show your work, we will compensate you accordingly. This is a long-term role with room to grow.



HOW TO APPLY

Submit a proposal that includes: (1) links to your active HubSpot certifications, (2) 2–3 examples of workflows or landing pages you've built, (3) a brief answer to this question: "A prospect fills out a cybersecurity scorecard form. Walk me through how you'd build the follow-up automation in HubSpot." Generic proposals will not be considered.

title: Experienced E-Commerce Product SEO Specialist - Etsy/Shopify/Amazon/Ebay - Immediate Hire
description:
Immediate Hire: Must be able to interview and start right away 



We are seeking a highly skilled SEO Product Specialist to join our growing Filipino-based eCommerce team. You will be responsible for optimizing product listings across Etsy, Shopify, and Amazon to ensure our products rank high and convert effectively. We operate 5 eCommerce stores that require ongoing SEO updates and A+ content creation. You will create graphics, update listings, add new products, update pricing, and more. 



You will be working directly with our team lead/team that is based in the Philippines; however, work hours are 10 PM GMT to 3 AM GMT, and PHP time 



Responsibilities

Optimize product titles, tags, descriptions, and backend SEO across multiple platforms.

Upload and configure Shopify product listings with SEO-optimized content.

Add products, manage, and update TikTok Seller Central listings.

Create engaging A+ Content (Amazon Enhanced Brand Content) with strong visuals and persuasive copy.

Stay up to date with platform algorithm changes (Etsy SEO, Amazon SEO, Shopify SEO, TikTok SEO).

Collaborate with our remote team on product strategy and performance tracking.

Amazon PPC ads are a plus.  



 Skills & Requirements

Minimum 2-3 years of proven SEO experience (multi-platform preferred).

Strong understanding of Shopify product setup and management.

Knowledge of TikTok Seller Central functions.

Graphic design skills for creating A+ content, banners, and product images. ( Photoshop & Canva) 

Dependable, detail-oriented, and serious about long-term work.

Must have a Wise account for payments.

Must be fluent in English - written and verbal. 





Application Instructions

If you meet the above requirements, please submit all of the following to 
 



Resume

Portfolio with examples of A+ product content you have created

SEO Sample (Etsy, Amazon, Shopify, or TikTok)

Brief Introduction explaining why you are the best fit for this role. Be sure to “sell yourself.” If you can’t sell yourself, how can you sell our products?

Include the link to your online jobs profile( we only hire from the Philippines) 

Verify that you understand the job requirements, salary, hours, NDA,  contract, and timeproof 

Verify that you can interview and start immediately 





 Interview Policy

All interviews will be conducted via video meeting. Please ensure your camera is working before the scheduled time.

Interviews will not be conducted without video.





This role is designed for individuals who are committed to building a stable, long-term career and are eager to grow with our team. If that sounds like you, we’re excited to meet you!

title: Bilingual Front Desk Associate (Spanish Speaking)
description:
Job Overview



We are seeking a professional and patient-focused Bilingual Front Desk Associate (Spanish-Speaking) to serve as the first point of contact for patients. This role is responsible for handling front desk operations, assisting Spanish-speaking patients, and ensuring a smooth and welcoming experience from scheduling to check-in.



The ideal candidate is friendly, organized, and confident communicating in both English and Spanish.



Key Responsibilities



Patient Communication & Front Desk Support



Greet and assist patients in both English and Spanish

Answer incoming calls and respond to patient inquiries

Schedule, confirm, and manage appointments

Assist with patient check-in, forms, and general concerns



Administrative Tasks



Maintain accurate patient records in the system (EMR/EHR)

Verify and update patient information

Coordinate with clinical and administrative teams as needed



Insurance & Basic Support



Assist with basic insurance verification and patient eligibility checks

Communicate copays, balances, and appointment details to patients

Support general front desk and administrative workflows

Qualifications

Fluent in Spanish and English (spoken and written)

Previous experience in front desk, customer service, or healthcare setting preferred

Strong communication and interpersonal skills

Highly organized with attention to detail

Comfortable using computers, scheduling systems, and EMRs

Professional and patient-centered attitude

Ideal Candidate

Friendly, warm, and confident when speaking with patients

Reliable and able to manage tasks independently

Organized and detail-oriented

Comfortable working in a fast-paced environment



This role is ideal for someone who enjoys helping patients, communicating across languages, and being a key part of a smooth and welcoming clinic experience.

title: AI Video Editor & Creator
description:
Hey there!



I am looking for an AI Video Editor & Creator who can create short-form videos using modern AI tools, based on references — but also bring in their own ideas and creativity.



This is a part-time role (around 20 hours per week).



Here are examples of the type of videos we are looking for:



Video Examples:





Please let me know your favorite animal at the beginning of your proposal and why.



Your main task will be:

Creating videos in a similar style using AI tools — but also developing new ideas, scripts, and variations based on those references.



You do NOT need to be a traditional video editor.

This role is much more about thinking, creating, and executing with AI tools.



You should be able to:



* understand a topic and quickly get into it

* come up with video ideas and concepts

* help write or improve simple scripts

* recreate existing videos based on references

* create new variations and original videos

* use AI tools to generate visuals, voice, and content

* edit videos so they are clean, engaging, and ready to use



Today, tools like AI video generators, ChatGPT, Gemini and other tools can help create videos much faster.



Experience with tools like MakeUGC, Arcads AI, or similar AI video and automation tools is a big plus.

If you have worked with any AI tools, please mention which ones in your application.



What matters to us is not which tools you use, but that the final result works and matches the style.



Important:

We are not looking for a traditional video editor.

We are looking for someone who can think, create, and execute using AI.



The videos should feel similar in:



* style

* pacing

* structure

* overall quality



But we also want you to bring your own ideas and improve the content.



Please share your recent work:



* videos you have created or edited

* if you don’t have client work, you can also share personal or practice projects



Payment per month: 300 USD

Weekly you will spend around 20 hours per week



Additional question (important):

Pick one of the example videos and briefly explain (3–6 sentences):



* how you would recreate it

* and how you would improve it or create a variation



Test task:

If your application is a good fit, I will send you a test task in the next step.



Important:

The test task will not be paid.

It is used to evaluate your ability to match our style, think creatively, and work with AI tools.



We are looking for someone reliable and long-term.



Looking forward to your application!



Eugen

title: Outbound Appointment Setter (BPO / High-Volume Dialer)
description:
Outbound Appointment Setter (BPO / High-Volume Dialer)



Remote | Performance Bonuses | Long-Term Opportunity



We are hiring outbound appointment setters to call service business owners in the United States and either transfer interested owners to our closer or book a short presentation on the closer’s calendar.



Multiple openings available.

Leads are provided.

No research required.

This is a high-volume dialing role.



Your job is appointment setting only.

You will not run demos.

You will not close sales.



What You Will Do

• Make 80–120 outbound calls per day

• Speak with business owners and decision makers

• Get past gatekeepers

• Live transfer interested owners to the closer when available

• Book a 15–20 minute presentation on the closer’s calendar when a live transfer is not possible

• Send short follow-up messages when requested, then continue follow-up by phone

• Make calls inside GoHighLevel CRM (training provided)



What We Provide

• Leads

• GoHighLevel dialer access

• Business phone number

• Business

• Closer calendar to book presentations

• Simple workflow and long-term opportunity for strong performers



Work Schedule

• Calls are made during US business hours

• Typical calling window is 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM in the prospect’s local time zone



Performance Bonuses

• $5 per qualified presentation attended

• $100 bonus if the deal closes from your appointment



Who Should Apply

This role is a good fit if you:

• Have outbound BPO or call center experience

• Can make a high number of calls consistently

• Speak clear, confident English

• Are comfortable speaking with US business owners

• Can handle objections and keep moving

• Have reliable internet, a quiet workspace, and a headset



BPO or outbound call center experience is strongly preferred.



Required Proof of Experience

To be considered, include:

• Your BPO or call center role

• The type of outbound campaign you worked on

• Your highest number of calls in one day

• Your typical daily call volume



How To Apply

Start your message with:

APPOINTMENT



Then complete all 3 steps below.



Step 1 – Upload a 30–45 second voice recording

Say this exactly:

“Hi, this is [your name]. I know your time is tight, so I’ll be quick. If a potential customer calls after hours — say 8 PM — does someone answer, or does it go to voi
?”



Step 2 – Answer these 3 questions

a) What is the highest number of calls you made in one day?

b) What was your last high-volume outbound job, and what was your typical daily call volume?

c) Would 100 calls per day feel normal or stressful for you, and why?



Step 3 – Confirm your setup

Please confirm you have:

• Reliable internet

• A quiet place to work

• A headset for calls



About Us

TaskPilot helps service business owners handle the office side of their business more efficiently.

Website: 



Applications without the voice recording will not be reviewed.

title: Xactimate Estimator & Supplement Specialist (Roofing + Siding| Detail-Obsessed Operator Required) Part Time to Full Time
description:
Currently hiring part time 20 hrs/week at $5/hr. Will convert to full time depending on performance.



About Us



We are a fast-growing, U.S.-based roofing and Siding company focused on accuracy, speed, and maximizing claim value. Our internal systems are structured, our expectations are high, and our goal is simple:



Every estimate should be complete, defensible, and ready for approval without rework.



We are not looking for order-takers.

We are looking for problem-solvers who think through the entire job scope before submitting anything.



The Role (What You’ll Actually Be Doing)



You will own the front-end estimating and supplement process, ensuring every project is properly scoped, documented, and positioned for approval.



This includes:



Reviewing insurance Scopes of Loss and comparing them to real project requirements

Identifying missing line items, code requirements, and overlooked scope gaps

Writing clean, structured Xactimate estimates and supplements

Rebuilding estimates when needed (not copying thinking)

Reviewing photos, EagleView reports, and documentation for accuracy

Preparing files that require minimal to zero revision before approval

Organizing all project files in Google Drive

Assisting with material ordering based on finalized scopes

Supporting internal communication on Slack regarding job status and scope clarity



What Success Looks Like in This Role

Your estimates are approved faster with fewer revisions

You consistently catch what others miss

You can handle multiple files without sacrificing accuracy

Your files are organized, labeled, and easy to audit

You think through the entire build process not just the estimate line items



Minimum Requirements (Non-Negotiable)

2–5 years working with U.S.-based clients

Strong experience using Xactimate (X1)

Ability to read and interpret insurance scopes of loss

Understanding of residential roofing and/or Siding

Ability to identify code-required upgrades and missing scope items

Strong written and spoken English

Ability to work independently in a remote environment

Preferred (But Not Required)

Experience writing and negotiating supplements

Background in roofing, exterior Siding, or general construction

Familiarity with AccuLynx, JobNimbus, Google Drive, Excel

Experience reading blueprints or EagleView reports



Tools We Use

Xactimate X1

Google Drive

Excel / Google Sheets

Slack

AccuLynx (optional)



Work Schedule

Part-Time

Monday–Friday

Within 8:00 AM – 4:00 PM (Central Time)



Important Operating Standard (Read Carefully)

Every estimate must be structured in a way that allows our team to move directly into production without confusion or missing scope.



This includes one non-negotiable requirement:

You must input the EagleView roof drawings at the end of every estimate.

Failure to follow this instruction will be treated as a critical process breakdown, not a small mistake.



How to Apply (Read This Twice - Most People Fail Here)



Submit the following:



1) Your resume

2) A 60-second video explaining:

- Your Xactimate experience

- Types of projects you’ve handled

- Say the word "Bozo Buckets" at beginning the video

3) If you were a dog or a cat which breed  would you be?



Will not consider any applications missing the above 3.

?

?

?

title: Lead Generation & Data Research Assistant
description:
Job Title



Lead Generation & Job Research Assistant (Full-Time, Remote)



?

?

title: EXECUTIVE ASSISTANT / OPERATIONS COORDINATOR
description:
Executive Assistant / Operations Coordinator



Remote | Full-Time | Long-Term Opportunity

Compensation: $800–$1,300/month (including performance bonus)



?



About the Role



I operate multiple nail salons in California and a growing coaching program for nail salon owners.



Over time, a large volume of content, systems, documents, and materials has been created. While the business is functioning well, these assets are not yet fully organized into a clear, structured system.



I am looking for an Executive Assistant / Operations Coordinator who can bring organization, clarity, and structure to the business.



This is not a basic administrative role. The right candidate must be able to think independently, organize effectively, and execute without constant direction.



?



Role Objective



Your primary responsibility is to organize and structure the backend of the business so that all systems, files, and information are clear, accessible, and easy to manage.



?



Key Responsibilities



1. Organization and System Development

	•	Organize documents, photos, and internal materials

	•	Ensure all reports are accurate and updated daily



5. Payroll and Data Accuracy

	•	Track employee hours (daily or weekly)

	•	Prepare payroll data twice per month

	•	Verify all data for accuracy before submission



6. Administrative and Coordination Support

	•	Manage calendar and scheduling

	•	Assist with Zoo
etings and coordination

	•	Communicate with tea
mbers and follow up on tasks

	•	Ensure execution and completion of assigned work



?



Important Note



Most coaching content is in Vietnamese. Fluency in Vietnamese is not required. Your responsibility is to organize and manage content based on provided materials.



?



Required Skills

	•	Strong organizational and system-building ability

	•	High attention to detail and accuracy

	•	Ability to work independently and follow through

	•	Clear and professional communication

	•	Strong sense of responsibility and ownership



?



Tools



Experience with the following is preferred:

	•	Google Drive, Docs, and Sheets

	•	Go HighLevel

	•	Zoom



Candidates must be comfortable learning new systems quickly.



?



Schedule

	•	Full-time (8 hours per day)

	•	Must overlap with California business hours



?



Compensation

	•	Base salary: $800–$1,000/month

	•	Performance bonus: $100–$300/month



Bonus is based on:

	•	Accuracy and completeness of reports

	•	Quality of organization and systems

	•	Payroll accuracy

	•	Task completion and follow-through



?



What Success Looks Like

	•	Files and systems are organized, structured, and easy to navigate

	•	Coaching materials are clear and professionally presented

	•	Reports are consistently accurate and submitted on time

	•	Payroll is prepared accurately and without error

	•	The business operates with greater clarity and reduced confusion



?



Do Not Apply If

	•	You struggle with organization

	•	You do not follow through on tasks

	•	You miss important details



?



How to Apply



Please submit:

	1.	Your resume

	2.	An example of a system, file structure, or process you have organized

Explain step-by-step how you would organize a Google Drive with hundreds of unstructured files

	4.	Your time zone and availability



?





This role is best suited for someone who takes pride in organization, structure, and reliability. If you are proactive, detail-oriented, and capable of bringing order to complex environments, we welcome your application.

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 350 – 500 per hour

Employment Type: Part-time

Required Experience: 1-2 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



What You'll Do



As a Video Editor, you will help create engaging video content used for advertising, marketing, and social media campaigns.

Your responsibilities may include:

• Editing raw footage into engaging short-form videos

• Adding captions, transitions, music, and basic graphics

• Repurposing long-form videos into shorter clips for social media

• Optimizing videos for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

• Collaborating with the marketing team to produce content for campaigns

• Organizing video assets and maintaining editing files



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for someone who has basic to intermediate video editing skills and is passionate about creating engaging digital content.



You should have experience or knowledge in:

• Video editing using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar software

• Editing short-form videos for social media

• Adding captions, simple motion graphics, and transitions

• Understanding pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Optimizing videos for social media formats and platforms

• Basic audio editing and background music integration



You do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable learning new editing techniques and improving your skills.



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



• A recent graduate or early-career creative professional

• Has 1–2 years of experience in video editing or content creation

• Creative and has a good eye for storytelling and visuals

• Familiar with social media video trends

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to work remotely and meet deadlines

• Interested in building a long-term career in digital content and marketing



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital



• Fully remote work setup

• Competitive hourly pay

• Opportunity to work on real marketing campaigns

• Build a strong video editing portfolio

• Work with a growing digital marketing team



If you're passionate about video editing, digital content, and creative storytelling, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

title: Media Buyer (PPC Specialist)
description:

Employment Type: Full-time or Part-time

Required Experience: 3-5 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google Ads and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



Our team works remotely and focuses on performance, accountability, and results. We are now looking for a seasoned Media Buyer (PPC Specialist) who can take ownership of campaigns and drive measurable growth.



What You'll Do



As a Media Buyer (PPC Specialist), you will be responsible for managing, optimizing, and scaling paid advertising campaigns across multiple platforms.



Your responsibilities include:

• Managing and scaling campaigns on Google Ads and Meta Ads Manager

What Are We Looking For?

Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



You are someone who:

• Has 3–5 years of hands-on experience and is confident in your skills

• Is a mid to senior-level media buyer

• Thinks strategically and executes with precision

• Is highly accountable and results-oriented

• Can diagnose and solve campaign performance issues independently

• Communicates clearly and works well in a remote team

• Is proactive, detail-oriented, and performance-driven

• Can provide at least 2 reference checks from former managers or clients

• Handled local service campaigns (plumbing, home services, etc.) — experience in this vertical is a strong plus



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital?

• Competitive monthly salary aligned with experience

• Opportunity to manage and scale high-impact campaigns

• Work with a performance-driven and fast-growing team

If you are a confident, experienced PPC specialist ready to take ownership of campaigns and drive real results.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist & Automation Assistant
description:
About the Role

We're looking for a hands-on GoHighLevel expert to fully own and manage all tasks within our GHL environment. This is not a support role — you'll be the go-to person responsible for building, maintaining, troubleshooting, and optimizing everything inside our GHL account and its connected systems.



What You'll Be Doing

Managing and maintaining our entire GoHighLevel (LeadConnector) setup — workflows, pipelines, funnels, calendars, contacts, and CRM configuration

Building and troubleshooting automations using GHL's native workflow builder as well as external tools like n8n

Configuring, managing, and troubleshooting Twilio integrations (SMS, voice, number provisioning, A2P registration, call routing, etc.)

Setting up and maintaining
 infrastructure — domain authentication (SPF, DKIM, DMARC), warmup, deliverability monitoring, and inbox management

Creating and managing
 campaigns including drip sequences, broadcasts, and automated follow-ups

Handling basic web development tasks — editing landing pages, funnels, forms, and custom code snippets within GHL or connected platforms

Identifying issues proactively and troubleshooting problems across the full stack (GHL, Twilio,
, automations, webhooks, APIs)



Requirements

Must-Have:

Deep, hands-on experience with GoHighLevel / LeadConnector — you should know the platform inside and out

Strong understanding of automation logic and workflow design in both GHL and tools like n8n

Experience configuring and troubleshooting Twilio (SMS/voice setup, compliance, error resolution)

Solid grasp of
 systems — sending infrastructure, authentication, deliverability best practices

Basic web development skills — comfortable with HTML/CSS, embedding scripts, editing funnels/landing pages, and working with APIs/webhooks

Ability to work independently, take full ownership of the GHL environment, and communicate clearly when issues arise

Nice-to-Have:

Experience building and optimizing
 marketing campaigns (copywriting, segmentation, A/B testing)

Familiarity with other automation platforms (Zapier, Make/Integromat)

Experience with custom API integrations and webhook configurations

Knowledge of GHL's white-label/SaaS mode

Background in digital marketing or lead generation



Ideal Candidate Profile

You're someone who thrives on solving problems and doesn't need hand-holding. You've set up GHL accounts from scratch, dealt with Twilio headaches, debugged broken automations at odd hours, and understand why an
 landed in spam. You think in systems and workflows, and you take pride in making everything run smoothly behind the scenes.



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

A brief overview of your GHL experience (how long, what types of setups)

Examples of automations you've built (GHL workflows, n8n flows, or similar)

Your experience with Twilio — what you've configured and troubleshot

Any relevant
 campaign or deliverability work you've done

Your availability and preferred working arrangement

title: Property Manager
description:
Due to a period of development and growth LifeStyle are now looking to recruit a number of experienced Administrators and particularly those that have excellent client communication skills to join their dedicated and close-nit team.



Who are we:



LifeStyle are probably North Bristol's most active Letting & Estate Agents. We have been serving the local area for over 30 years and have established relationships with clients, partners and tenants.



We take care of over 1000 Landlords with approximately 3000 units that result in a fair number of daily rent payments that require processing.



We pride ourselves on having family roots and our staff turnover is extremely low. We are a team. We work hard, respect each other and enjoy the journey - together!



Responsibilities of the role:



Control the day to day elements of the property referencing process - ensuring prospective tenants are eligible for the property they wish to rent.



Liaising with tenants and landlords.



Operating different cloud based systems to ensure tenants are legal, eligible and insured for the property they wish to let.



You will be timely and not afraid of dealing with clients on the telephone or
.



You will be working to constant deadlines to ensure people can move in to their property.



What we are looking for:



Confident and client focused, clear speaking professional that is able to work at pace in a fast moving environment and to deadline.

An accomplished team player, who has a strong work ethic and wants to do a great job!

Highly organised with the ability to prioritise and multi task.

Meticulous and accurate with impeccable attention to detail.

Confident communicator with a good telephone manner.

Building relationships with people internally and externally with come naturally to you.

Most importantly - our roots are in a family run business. It is the core of LifeStyle.

We operate morally, ethically and lovingly as one big family with the respect and care for each other and our clients.



We are always on the look out for like-minded individuals. We believe it's what makes us who we are !

title: URGENT: Hiring "AI Influencer" Video Creator/Editor ( Veo3, CapCut, HeyGen, ElevenLabs etc. )
description:
Please read the ENTIRE description before applying! :)



Our current candidate may NOT continue due to his personal life problems so we're now ONLY looking for VERY dedicated members with experience in CapCut and other AI tools mentioned. This opportunity is seriously much better than it sounds at first glance!







A few words about us:



Hey! We are Organic Media, a micro-agency creating and distributing educational and engaging AI-generated short-form videos for e-commerce brands, mainly in the pet niche.



You’ll work directly with our amazing manager ( 20 years old from Europe, with over 3 years of real experience in this exact space ), who has personally prepared step-by-step tutorials on Loom to teach you everything from the ground up.

No confusion. No guessing. No wasted time. ( Most tea
mbers learned the workflow within a few days and are now working fully independently )







What kind of videos will you create?

Simple UGC-like short-form videos fully based on the provided scripts by us ( you might just need to tweak a few words if needed ) which look realistic and feel "natural" to the viewers on platforms like YouTube Shorts, Instagram or
. Some of them are silently advertising products at the end but the key is that it doesn't sound like an ad but rather a native short-form video which a real person/influencer would record with their iPhone. There are a few styles such as just a calm "sit down" video ( where there's only one image and the influencer would just talk for 2 minutes ) or other ones where there're a few "shots" of them with a few seconds each and the scenes change but it's really not difficult at all - just a few more generations and then connecting them in CapCut.





The process is straightforward:

Getting our scripts ready and approved, using your own creativity and generating high quality base images using tools like Nano Banana Pro, turning these images into video clips using platforms like Veo3, Kling or HeyGen and for voice ElevenLabs, cuts and trimming, other minor adjustments such as background audio effects if needed ( like supermarket background audio ). Whole process is 90% just creating the right images/video clips etc, we might not even do transitions or captions so there won't be much editing skill needed. Everything is shown clearly in the training.



You’ll be creating a lot of videos a day but these are not complex edits AT ALL. Difficulty level: 6/10 ( again, 80% is just generating the rate "input" images and later just animating them with voice. That's it )





Here are visual examples of what the videos look like ( NOT OURS ):

1. 
/reel/DTty7hsAHe_/

2. 
/reel/DT0R9KgDkuW/

3. 
/reel/DSc75hsDQV6/

4. 
/reel/DT8pDFngXfp/

5. 
/reel/DUOAHm3kY7P/



( In your application, let us know your thoughts, do you think you can easily recreate them - what tools would you use and why? )





Training & onboarding ( this is the biggest advantage )

Once hired, you will receive structured video tutorials. In total, we have a few hours available, though most people don’t need all of it. The workflow is clear so no missing steps and no “figure it out yourself.”







Daily workload ( important )

You’ll create around 10 to 20+ videos per day ( 1 to 2 min long - we’ll start with a smaller amount and later increase it - won't negatively affect your monthly pay. We just want to make it easier for you to start - ultimately we'll be doing 20+ but making sure it's under 8-10h a day, at first it may take you longer and we may work harder - but once learned it easily becomes manageable ).

In reality, you'd have exactly 4 unique "AI influencers" but all of 4 them have the same scripts to use, you'd just need to change a few words to help with the context ( some of them might be talking only about "dogs" but some about "cats" so just need to change a few words to make it all make sense ) and you could use the same image prompts to generate almost identical images for each influencer. In reality it’s just 2 to 6 original videos PER INFLUENCER ( 4 of them ) and each with a very similar structure. Once trained, this is very manageable.



Your job is simple:

Create the videos, export them, and send them to us daily on 
.

That’s it. No posting. No account management. No stress.







Equipment & storage ( we make this easy )

You’ll need a good computer that can smoothly handle 1080p/light 4k video editing ( we’ll do 1080p but we’re going to work on multiple browser tabs ), a stable internet connection, and at least 16GB of RAM and 250GB+ of fast storage AVAILABLE. 1TB+ of SSD storage is preferred ( make sure it’s SSD and not old and slow HDD ).



If you need to buy storage/RAM ( for example, a 1TB SSD for around $100 ), we will refund you. This is required ONLY to save you time and speed up your workflow so you can be more efficient since it can be a couple GB of files a day ( you can later remove them after sending them to us. )



There also may be small subscription costs which you’d have to cover later if needed ( only around $10 a month ) for services like iCloud+ on iPhone/iPad or 
 Nitro - we refund those as well.







Tools & software ( HUGE upside )

You get FREE access to ALL paid tools that cost us hundreds of dollars per month, including:

- AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Veo3,

- Copywriting software like ChatGPT+, Grok or Claude,

- Editing software like CapCut PRO on Desktop,

- and our CUSTOM voice-over tools like ElevenLabs,

We provide logins, instructions, and full support.

( ALL OF THEM ARE WORTH $500+ MONTHLY )





Work environment & communication

You’ll have a private 1:1 chat with our manager and separate one to send your daily work in, work fully remotely through 
, receive clear feedback, and be treated as a long-term tea
mber, not disposable labor.

No stressful interviews. No micromanagement. No slow
s back and forth.







Responsibilities

- Adjust our scripts for the context

- Create videos from start to finish.

- Export and send them.

- Apply feedback and improve.

- Prepare scripts for the next day.

- Organize files properly.

- Communicate clearly.

- Hit deadlines without reminders.

That’s it. Simple, repetitive, and enjoyable.







This job is perfect for you if

You’re looking for long-term stability ( months or years ), you’re willing to learn, tech-savvy, creative, organized, and able to focus consistently. You already have video creation/editing experience. Already done some AI influencers related jobs and have good experience in: Google VEO3, Nano Banana Pro, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, CapCut PRO and other similar tools. Your computer can handle multiple tabs open ( A LOT of them ). You care about doing things properly, understand and speak English well, respond to messages quickly, and can work up to 6 days per week. You’re a young, talented, smart individual. You’re okay with a slightly heavier learning phase in the first week, you’re not afraid to ask questions, you’re reliable and honest about mistakes, and you either already have or can get an iPhone device ( used only for specific verification codes - refunded if needed. You can even get some used iPhone 8 for like $40 which works ).

We value dedication, reliability, and improvement more than raw talent.







This job is not for you if

You’re looking for quick money, disappear without communication, can’t focus, you’re on the older side and have never edited 1 video in your life, never played with the AI tools mentioned above, your computer can’t handle having multiple tabs open at the same time, have unstable internet, refuse feedback, rush work carelessly, avoid consistency, or cannot communicate in English.







Salary & payments

This is a full-time position, starting at 6 days per week, under 10 hours per day. ( ultimately under 8h once you become very efficient, which our manager will help you achieve and it won't impact your salary working less - quite the opposite! )



Starting salary ranges from around $440-$540/month based on experience, with the potential in the future to increase to $540+ based on a few factors such as performance, dedication, and quality of work.



Payments are monthly, in any currency or method available in your country. ( we’ll try )



To build trust, we’re offering to pay you $100 after the first week of working with us, with the remaining balance at month end. ( we already got scammed by other platforms so please respect this )



And remember, we pay $500+ dollars/month for paid tools so you can get them for FREE meaning your pay is actually 100% profit + refunds for any costs of yours. ( meaning in theory your total compensation is closer to $1000+ including tool access )







Hiring process (step-by-step)

- Please re-read this job post carefully and only then submit your application.

- In your job application, make sure to set the right title and answer every point.

- We will review it and reach out with an extra message if accepted.

- We'll send you a Google Form to fill out with contact info, etc.

- You’ll be invited to our 
 server and will get your 1:1 chat.

- You'll complete the training and take notes of it to learn everything.

- We'll give you access to all the tools and refund any required purchases.

- You'll officially start creating videos for Organic Media and get hired.

Simple and effective.







Why this is a real opportunity

No confusion, no guessing, no unpaid trials. You get real structured video training on Loom, real tools, real support, and real long-term growth - including potential promotion to coach or lead roles.

Some jobs may offer to pay more, but very few:

Teach you properly step by step, invest in you, respect your time, and give you paid tools for free.







How to apply (pay attention)

Your application title must start with the first word “ Influencer ”:

“ Influencer: (…) “

Applications without this will be ignored.





In your application, please include the following:

- Your detailed thoughts on the 5 videos linked above,

- Your past experience ( or none - that’s fine ),

- Links to any past work or simple edits,

- a detailed introduction about yourself,

- Your daily routine and availability,

- Why you want this opportunity and why we should pick you over someone else. ( why you’re special )

- and detailed answers to these 15 questions:



1. Do you have experience using CapCut on DESKTOP? How long have you been using it, and what type of videos do you usually create with it?

2. Which AI video tools have you personally used? ( For example: VEO, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4,5, HeyGen, Vozo, etc.) Briefly describe what you used them for.

3. When you watch short-form videos that reuse existing footage, are you able to recognize patterns such as hooks, pacing, avatar placement, and caption timing? Please explain how you notice these patterns.

4. We work with very detailed step-by-step SOPs that specify exactly which clips to use and how to assemble them. How do you typically work when instructions are extremely clear and structured?

5. If you are unsure about a task or something does not match the instructions, what do you do?

6. When generating AI videos, what are the most common problems you run into? (for example: bad lip sync, weird hands, low realism, wrong lighting, artifacts, etc.)

7. Would you say you’re more of a creative problem-solver who looks for shortcuts, loopholes, or ways around limitations, or someone who prefers to strictly follow rules and structure?

8. Have you ever had to regenerate the same AI scene or just an image multiple times to get a usable result? What usually goes wrong and how do you fix it?

9. When working with AI tools, do you prefer experimenting freely or strictly following a proven workflow? Why?

10. Tell us about your PC specs, how much RAM and Available Storage and is it a PC or laptop/Macbook. Also, do you already have an iPhone/iPad? If so, which model is it/generation?

11. Are you good at learning? Meaning if you want to learn something by for example, watching YouTube tutorials - do you usually rewatch it or take notes? Or just watch it once and try it yourself?

12. Describe exactly how you usually organize your project files when working on multiple videos at the same time.

For example: how you name folders, how you separate drafts vs finals, and how you avoid losing assets.

13. Take a look at the job post once again and find the 5 video example links we've included above. Watch all of them fully and let us know your overall thoughts, how do you think they were created - what tools would you use and why? Please cover the whole process in detail ( these aren't our videos but very similar )

14. What are your long-term plans or goals with this opportunity?

15. To confirm that you’ve read everything carefully, please tell us your favorite meal and dessert, as well as a restaurant in your country. Explain why someone from outside your country should absolutely try it. :)





Do not use ChatGPT or any AI to fully write your application. Be real, honest and detailed. We value spelling mistakes over perfect, AI generated responses. ( Yes, we can detect AI generated responses and it just isn't a good look on you )



You must also follow our Instagram: ( 
/organicxmedia )







Final note

We are hiring ONLY 1 PERSON for this role and are focused strictly on long-term relationships ( months + )

If you are dedicated, reliable, and willing to learn, this can be a very comfortable long-term position. Good luck!

title: Virtual Recruiter
description:

title: Junior Creative Strategist
description:
We're a fast-growing health & beauty e-commerce company looking for a sharp junior creative strategist to lead the thinking behind our ad content across multiple brands.



What You'll Do



You'll dive deep into our ideal customer profiles and customer psychology to understand what truly drives purchasing decisions. You'll research competitors, analyze winning ads, and develop creative concepts that our team brings to life. You'll write hooks, scripts, and angles for VSLs, UGC, AI ads, and short-form ads, then track performance and iterate based on data. You're the bridge between what's working in the market and what our editors and designers produce.



What We Need



* Proven experience in creative strategy for e-commerce or direct response brands

* Strong ability to research and deeply understand target audiences, their pain points, desires, and buying triggers

* Deep understanding of Meta and Google/YT ad ecosystems

* Ability to research, analyze, and reverse-engineer winning ad creatives

* Strong copywriting skills including hooks, scripts, CTAs, and advertorial angles

* Data-driven mindset with a focus on ad performance and knowing what to test next

* Fluent in English, both written and spoken

* Organized, deadline-driven, and comfortable managing multiple brands at once

* Self-motivated with a habit of bringing strategies and ideas to the table rather than waiting for direction



Nice to Have



* Experience in the health, beauty, or supplement space

* Understanding of the full funnel from ad creative through landing page to conversion



To Apply



Send us a brief intro, examples of ad concepts or campaigns you've developed, and any results you can share. We want to see how you think, not just what you've made.

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Us:

Viral Vault Studios is a fast-growing company with a strong focus on building engaging digital communities through our social media business. In this role, you’ll primarily lead social media and branding initiatives, with the exciting possibility to also contribute to my other second business, Michaud CPA, an accounting firm. title: Bookkeeper / Accountant
description:
Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant – First Class Media 



**Hours:** Part-Time (est. 5–15 hrs/month, flexible)

**Compensation:** $3-7/hr USD (based on experience)

**Start Date:** ASAP



---



About Us



First Class Media is a US-based drone media company specializing in high-quality photography and videography for real estate clients. We produce property content that helps agents and developers market their listings at the highest level. We're a small, fast-moving operation and we're looking for a reliable accounting professional to help us stay financially organized as we grow.



--



Role Overview



We're hiring a remote bookkeeper/accounting assistant to manage our books, help with tax preparation, and generate regular financial reports. This is a part-time, ongoing role with potential to grow. You'll work directly with the owner and have a high degree of independence — we need someone trustworthy, detail-oriented, and proactive.



---



Responsibilities



- Record and categorize all business transactions (income, expenses, transfers)

- Reconcile bank and credit card statements monthly

- Maintain the general ledger and chart of accounts

- Track outstanding invoices and accounts receivable

- Organize and document deductible business expenses

- Assist with quarterly estimated tax preparation (US-based filings)

- Track equipment, gear, and vehicle-related deductions

- Generate monthly and on-demand financial reports

- Issue 1099s to contractors as needed



---



Reports You'll Own



- Profit & Loss Statement (monthly)

- Cash Flow Statement

- Expense Breakdown by Category

- Revenue by Client

- Accounts Receivable Aging

- Tax Summary Report (quarterly/annually)

- Budget vs. Actual



---



Requirements



- Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting (2+ years preferred)

- Proficiency in **QuickBooks Online**, **Xero**, or **Wave**

- Solid understanding of US tax basics for small businesses (self-employment, deductions, 1099s)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently

- Reliable internet connection and availability for occasional video check-ins

- Excellent written English communication



---



Nice to Have



- Experience working with US-based clients or businesses

- Filipino CPA license or equivalent certification

- Familiarity with service-based or creative industry businesses



---



We look forward to hearing from you!
