title: AI Bot Developer
description:
See the full job description here: 





We're seeking an expert AI Bot Developer to join our growing development team. This is a combined Voice AI + Chat AI role — a unique opportunity to work across the full spectrum of conversational AI technology, building custom solutions that directly impact real estate businesses across North America.



As our AI Bot Developer, you'll be responsible for designing, building, testing, and maintaining sophisticated Voice AI systems (Retell AI, Vapi, UltraVox) and Chat AI systems (CloseBot, GoHighLevel) while leveraging tools like Claude Code to accelerate the development process. You'll work closely with our CEO, Chief of Product, QA Specialist, and the rest of the development team to create custom voice and chat experiences that solve real business problems for our clients.



We're scaling rapidly — onboarding 2-4 new clients per month — which means you'll have the opportunity to work on diverse, challenging projects while being part of a high-growth company.



You're the perfect fit if you:

   - Love solving technical problems - You get satisfaction from debugging, troubleshooting, and finding elegant solutions

   - Are extremely detail-oriented - You notice small bugs, edge cases, and potential issues others miss

   - Thrive on precision and accuracy - You take pride in writing clean, well-documented workflows that function flawlessly

   - Are methodical and patient - You can work through complex technical challenges systematically without getting frustrated

   - Follow processes religiously - You understand that consistency, documentation, and standards are critical in development

   - Are analytical and logical - You use data and systematic thinking to diagnose problems and implement solutions

   - Work well independently - You don't need constant supervision but collaborate effectively when needed

   - Are naturally curious - You want to understand how things work and are always learning new technologies

   - Value quality over speed - You'd rather build it right than build it fast

   - Are a team player - You collaborate well, communicate clearly, and support your teammates



Key Responsibilities



Voice AI Development (30% of time)

   - Design, build, and deploy custom Voice AI solutions using Retell AI (primary platform), with experience across Vapi and UltraVox

   - Work with our Integrations Specialist to integrate custom nodes and custom functions to serve client-specific needs

   - Develop and integrate complex conversation flows for lead qualification and appointment scheduling

   - Configure voice settings, prompts, and AI behaviors optimized for real estate wholesalers, investors, and property managers

   - Implement custom integrations with CRMs, calendars, and third-party systems

   - Work with LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini Flash) to optimize Voice AI performance

   - Handle JSON configuration, API integrations, and webhook development



Chat AI Development (30% of time)

   - Design, build, and deploy custom Chat AI solutions using CloseBot

   - Build sophisticated conversation flows for lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and property detail gathering

   - Develop automated workflows that integrate with CRMs, calendars, and marketing systems

   - Implement complex conditional logic and multi-step qualification processes

   - Create custom integrations with GoHighLevel and third-party platforms

   - Handle API integrations, webhooks, and workflow automations



Testing & Quality Assurance (20% of time)

   - Work alongside our QA Specialist to conduct thorough testing before client deployment

   - Test conversation flows, edge cases, trigger conditions, and failure scenarios across both Voice AI and Chat AI

   - Troubleshoot and debug issues across all AI implementations

   - Ensure all solutions meet PropertyBots quality standards before launch



Maintenance & Support (20% of time)

   - Monitor and maintain existing client Voice AI and Chat AI systems

   - Fix bugs and resolve technical issues promptly

   - Handle assigned support tickets from clients and internal team

   - Upgrade and optimize current client implementations

   - Continuously improve voice and chat flows based on performance data



Documentation & Collaboration

   - Build comprehensive SOPs and technical documentation for all solutions

   - Document custom functions, workflows, integrations, and automation processes

   - Collaborate with the QA Specialist and account management team to customize solutions for new clients

   - Attend daily team syncs at 10:00 AM ET, Monday – Friday

   - Maintain clear communication via ClickUp Chat and Google Meet

   - Occasionally interface directly with clients for technical requirements



Required Qualifications

?? Mandatory Platform Experience

You must have hands-on experience building AI agents using all of the following tools:

- Retell AI — Voice AI development (primary voice platform)

- CloseBot — Chat AI development (primary chat platform)

- GoHighLevel — CRM, automation, workflows, and integrations

- n8n — Workflow automation

- Supabase — Database and backend



Core Requirements

- Minimum 1 year of Voice AI development experience (Retell AI, Vapi, and/or UltraVox)

- Minimum 1 year of Chat AI development experience (CloseBot and GoHighLevel)

- Full English fluency (written and verbal) — ability to communicate clearly with team and clients

- Located in the Philippines — must be able to work EST business hours (9:00 AM – 6:00 PM EST)

- Reliable and stable internet connection — this is mandatory for a remote role with real-time collaboration and voice testing



Technical Skills

- JSON configuration and manipulation

- API integrations and RESTful services

- Webhook development and implementation

- Understanding of asynchronous programming

- Workflow automation design and implementation

- Conditional logic and decision tree mapping

- Deep understanding of LLMs (Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini Flash) as they relate to Voice AI and Chat AI applications



Proficiency With Our Tech Stack

- Retell AI (Voice AI platform) — REQUIRED

- CloseBot (Chat AI platform) — REQUIRED

- GoHighLevel (CRM and automation) — REQUIRED

- n8n (workflow automation) — REQUIRED

- Supabase (database) — REQUIRED

- ClickUp (project management)

- Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Drive)

- Google Meet (video conferencing)



Soft Skills

- Exceptional attention to detail — you catch bugs and edge cases others miss

- Strong problem-solving skills — creative solutions to complex technical challenges

- Team player mentality — collaborative, supportive, and communicative

- Autonomous work style — self-motivated, reliable, and accountable without micromanagement



Preferred Qualifications

- Experience with Vapi and UltraVox Voice AI platforms

title: Onboarding Lead/Project Manager (CINC Systems)
description:
CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager

Sliceo – Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | U.S. Eastern Hours



About Sliceo

Sliceo is a technology and operations consulting firm focused exclusively on the community association management (CAM) industry. We help property management companies modernize their technology stack, workflows, and operational infrastructure.



Our work includes:

• Implementing and optimizing property management systems such as CINC Systems

• Designing and integrating software ecosystems for management companies

• Workflow automation and AI enablement

• IT coordination, cybersecurity planning, and system integrations

• Operational process design and training

• Supporting management companies through growth, technology transitions, and modernization



Sliceo works closely with proptech providers, integration partners, and management companies to ensure technology implementations are successful and that clients fully adopt and benefit from their systems.



As Sliceo expands, we are building a world-class onboarding and implementation team to support management companies implementing the CINC platform and related integrations.



Position Overview

The CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager is responsible for coordinating and supporting the successful implementation of CINC Systems and related technology solutions for management company clients.



This role works directly with:

• Management company leadership and operational teams

• Sliceo implementation and consulting teams

• CINC Systems implementation teams

• Integration and technology partners

• Sliceo development and IT teams



You will serve as the primary project coordinator and onboarding guide during system implementation, ensuring that clients successfully configure, adopt, and integrate their technology platform.



This role is highly client-facing and requires strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.



Key Responsibilities

Implementation Project Management

• Coordinate CINC platform implementations for management company clients

• Manage implementation timelines, milestones, and deliverables

• Track progress across multiple concurrent implementation projects

• Ensure successful project completion and client sign-off



Client Onboarding & System Configuration

• Work with clients to understand their current operational workflows

• Assist in designing and documenting best-practice workflows using CINC technology

• Support configuration of CINC modules including community tools, portals, and communication systems

• Coordinate onboarding for WebAxis, CINC Connect, homeowner/board portals, and other platform features



Data Migration Support

• Assist with migration of data from legacy systems into CINC

• Use Excel and data mapping tools to prepare, clean, and validate migration files

• Coordinate with technical teams to ensure accurate data transfers



Integration Coordination

• Work with Sliceo’s development and IT teams to support integration projects

• Help coordinate integrations between CINC and other software platforms

• Assist with rollout of partner technology solutions within the client’s tech stack



Training & Adoption

• Provide onboarding training and guidance to management company teams

• Support clients during early adoption of the platform

• Help create documentation and implementation SOPs

• Ensure clients are comfortable using their systems and workflows



Client Support & Issue Resolution

• Identify configuration issues or system errors during implementation

• Coordinate with technical teams to resolve issues

• Help ensure the client experience remains positive throughout the project lifecycle



Documentation & Project Tracking

• Maintain project documentation and implementation records

• Track tasks and milestones using Sliceo’s project management tools

• Maintain organized documentation within SharePoint and Zoho One systems



Required Skills & Experience

• 4+ years of experience implementing software for external clients or managing onboarding projects

• Experience working in client-facing project management roles

• Strong Excel skills, including data cleanup and migration preparation

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks without supervision

• Experience coordinating with multiple teams and departments



Preferred Experience

• Experience working with CINC Systems or similar property management platforms

• Experience in community association management (HOA/condo management)

• Experience implementing or supporting SaaS platforms

• Familiarity with property management software ecosystems

• Experience coordinating system integrations



Tools & Systems Used

You may work with tools such as:

• CINC Systems platform

• Excel and data migration tools

• Zoho One project management systems

• SharePoint documentation systems

• Time tracking tools

• Collaboration and implementation tracking software



Work Environment

title: CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)
description:
Job Title

CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)



READ THIS FIRST 

This role is for someone with deep, hands-on ownership of CINC Systems.

If your experience is limited to using CINC, assisting with setup, or following instructions created by someone else, do not apply.

We are specifically looking for someone who has built, configured, and owned multiple parts of CINC Systems in real HOA/Condo environments.



ROLE SUMMARY 

We are hiring a CINC Systems expert with a deep understanding of how CINC works end-to-end. You will be responsible for configuring, improving, and supporting multiple CINC modules, automations, workflows, and reporting structures.

This is not a narrow role. You are expected to understand how different modules interact and how configuration decisions impact operations, accounting, boards, and homeowners.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

You will personally:

• Configure and maintain CINC Systems environments

• Set up, customize, and optimize multiple CINC modules, such as:

o     Violations

o     Work Orders / Maintenance

o     Accounting-related workflows

o    Owner & Board portals

o    Vendors and services

o    Reporting and dashboards

• Build and manage:

o    Automation rules

o    Triggers and workflows

o    Custom fields and layouts

• Support system launches, migrations, and cleanups

• Create clear documentation for system logic and configuration

• Troubleshoot complex CINC issues independently

• Act as a senior internal resource before escalating to CINC support



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  (Non-Negotiable)

You must clearly demonstrate all of the following:

• Direct, hands-on experience building inside CINC Systems

• Experience configuring multiple CINC modules, not just one

• Strong understanding of how CINC behaves across:

o    Operations

o    Accounting

o    Compliance

o    Board and homeowner workflows

• Ability to explain why configuration and automation decisions were made

• Comfort owning systems without step-by-step instructions

If you have only “helped,” “assisted,” or “supported” CINC work created by others, this role is not a fit.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Applicants should be prepared to:

• Submit a resume with their application

• Discuss systems they have personally built

• Explain automation decisions and tradeoffs

• Demonstrate ownership, not assistance

You will be asked to give real examples. General or vague answers will be disqualified.



WORKING CONIDTIONS 

• Full-time remote, Independent Contractor

• Flexible EST-aligned hours

o    Pre-launch: Flexible, provided deliverables and communication are met

o    Post-launch: Expected overlap with standard business hours (9–5 or 10–6 EST)

• Occasional weekend work during launch phases

o    Not frequent

o    Communicated in advance

• Time tracking required (Hubstaff)



Must have:

• Personal computer used exclusively for work

• Backup computer, internet, and power

• Quiet, professional workspace



Compensation & Growth

• $9/hour starting rate

• Hourly rate increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term contractor relationship intended

• Opportunity to help shape systems, processes, and your own role as Sliceo grows

This role is designed for someone looking for long-term stability and ownership, not short-term task work.



CONFIDENTIALITY 

This role involves access to sensitive systems, internal strategy, and proprietary information. Strict confidentiality is required.



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS 

Applicants must answer the following:

Describe your hands-on experience with CINC Systems.



Include:

1. Which CINC modules you personally configured or built

2. One automation or workflow you owned end-to-end

3. A system decision you made and why you made it

4. How many years have you used CINC Systems?



***Applications without a resume or without clear ownership examples will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Civil Site Development Drafter – US Commercial Projects (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We are hiring an experienced Civil 3D drafter/designer to support U.S. commercial site development projects.



This is not an entry level drafting role. We are looking for someone who already knows how to produce high-quality commercial civil plan sets and can work confidently in AutoCAD Civil 3D with minimal supervision.



Experience matters more than degree or licensure. If you have strong hands-on experience drafting U.S. commercial site plans, we want to hear from you.



What you will do

 • Prepare complete commercial site civil plan sets

 • Draft and develop:

        • site layout plans

        • grading plans

        • utility plans

        • erosion control plans

        • plan/profile sheets for water, sewer, and paving

        • civil details and construction notes

 • Build and edit surfaces, profiles, alignments, and grading elements in Civil 3D

 • Assist with drainage layouts, stormwater exhibits, and drafting support for drainage reports

 • Prepare exhibits, redline revisions, permit revisions, and drawing updates

 • Support the team with drafting, estimating, quantity takeoffs, and other project-related tasks as needed

 • Maintain organized project files, CAD standards, and sheet setups

 • Help turn markups and direction from our team into clean, accurate, buildable plans



Must-have experience:

 • 5+ years of drafting/design experience in commercial site development

 • Strong AutoCAD Civil 3D skills

 • Real experience on U.S. commercial projects

 • Ability to produce grading plans, utility plans, and plan/profile sheets

 • Strong understanding of typical U.S. site development plan sets and commercial civil drafting standards

 • Able to read redlines, ask smart questions, and work independently

 • Good written English and reliable communication during work hours



Nice to have:

 • Experience with drainage reports or stormwater drafting support

 • Familiarity with tools such as HydroCAD, HEC-HMS, HEC-RAS, or ICPR

 • Experience with quantity takeoffs, estimating, or construction support

 • Residential subdivision work experience

 • EIT/PE is welcome, but not required



Important:

 • Degree is not required

 • License is not required

 • We care most about real experience, quality of work, speed, and accuracy



What success looks like in this role:

 • You can take a marked-up set and turn it into clean, organized sheets

 • You understand how commercial sites go together, not just how to draw lines

 • You catch drafting conflicts before they become problems

 • You can support a fast-moving team with drafting, takeoffs, revisions, and production work

 • You can work with minimal hand-holding and meet deadlines



Work schedule

 • 40 hours per week

 • Remote

 • Our office hours are 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Central Time. More overlap is preferred when possible, but we are flexible for the right candidate.



About us



We are a U.S.-based civil site development team focused on commercial projects. We offer a relaxed and friendly office environment and need a strong  drafter who can help us move projects forward with accurate plans, revisions, takeoffs, and general drafting support. This role is important to our day-to-day work and will directly support our internal team across multiple projects.



Benefits & employment

 • $1,700–$2,700/month, negotiated on experience

 • Full-time, 40 hours per week remote

 • Long-term opportunity with room to grow

 • This is a full-time employee role, with employment handled through an Employer of Record (EOR) and statutory benefits provided through the EOR



To apply



Please send:

 1. Your resume and headshot

 2. 2–3 sample projects, sheet examples, or links to redacted work samples you personally worked on

 3. The word GRADING in your application subject line so we know you read the full post



Screening questions:



Please answer these in your application:

 1. How many years of U.S. commercial site development experience do you have?

 2. What types of projects have you worked on: retail, industrial, multifamily, mixed-use, fuel station, office, residential,  etc.?

 3. Which parts of Civil 3D do you use confidently: surfaces, grading, profiles, alignments?

 4. Have you prepared grading plans, utility plans, and plan/profile sheets for U.S. jurisdictions?

 5. Have you worked from survey base files and coordinated internally with engineers or designers?

 6. Do you have experience with quantity takeoffs or estimating support?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary for full-time work?

title: Hiring Senior Dispute/Chargeback Manager (Fashion Dropshipping) – Own Risk + Recovery at Scales
description:
We run multiple fast-growing e-commerce fashion stores in the US market, powered primarily by Google Ads. We generated multiple 7 figures in revenue in 2025, and we are building a long-term operation with strong systems, high customer satisfaction, and clean processing metrics.



Disputes and chargebacks are a core lever in our business. They impact profitability, payment approvals, and our ability to scale. We are looking for a Senior Dispute/Chargeback Manager who can take full ownership of dispute operations and build a prevention system that keeps our chargeback rate low as volume grows.



Role Overview



You will own the dispute and chargeback function end-to-end across our stores. Your job is to reduce disputes, win more cases, and prevent chargebacks by improving processes across support, shipping communication, and documentation.



This is not a basic CS role. We want an operator who knows how to manage dispute pipelines, evidence packs, deadlines, win-rate optimization, and root-cause fixes.



What You’ll Do:



Take full ownership of disputes/chargebacks across all stores and processors (Mainly Shopify Payments but future PayPal, etc.)

Monitor daily chargebacks/dispute queues, deadlines, outcomes, and processing risk metrics

D
 what to fight vs refund vs settle early (based on reason codes, evidence strength, and cost/risk)

Build strong, consistent evidence packs (tracking proof, customer comms, policies, product page proof, fraud indicators)



Improve dispute win rate by creating templates, checklists, and SOPs for each dispute type

Implement chargeback prevention systems:

reduce “item not received” disputes with tracking and proactive comms

reduce “not as described” disputes by improving product expectations, sizing clarity, PDP claims

reduce “fraud” disputes with risk filtering rules and order verification triggers



Work closely with Customer Support and Fulfillment to fix the root causes (shipping delays, missing tracking, unclear policies, weak documentation)



Maintain a clean internal “chargeback knowledge base” (reason code playbooks, best evidence by processor, common pitfalls)



Deliver weekly reporting:

dispute rate, chargeback rate, win rate, fee totals, refunds, top drivers

top disputed products/angles, what changed, what needs action next



Requirements (Must Have)

• Proven experience managing disputes/chargebacks for high-volume e-commerce fashion dropshipping stores

• Strong understanding of dispute reason codes (Fraud, INR, Not as Described, Cancelled/Returned, etc.)

• Experience with Shopify Payments/Stripe and PayPal disputes (and how evidence differs)

• Excellent written English and professional documentation skills

• Highly organized: can manage deadlines, queues, evidence archives, and reporting

• Can operate independently and improve systems without being micromanaged



Nice to Have

• Experience in fashion/apparel dropshipping

• Experience supporting Google Ads stores (high intent, higher volume swings)

• Familiarity with chargeback tools/platforms (Chargeflow, Midigator, Disputifier, etc.)

• Experience creating risk rules for fraud prevention and order screening

• Experience building workflows/macros that reduce disputes in helpdesks like Gorgias/Commslayer



Why Join Us

• Real ownership and decision-making power in a critical function

• High growth environment with long-term vision and serious execution

• Opportunity to build a real system and grow into broader Risk/Ops leadership

• We treat the team with respect and reward strong performance, + we're fun and love working together!



To Apply (Important)

1. Send your resume + a short summary of your dispute/chargeback experience (monthly volume, win rate, platforms used).

2. Include the word "WINNER" at the start of your message so we can filter applicants quickly.

3. (Optional but preferred) Share a brief outline of what you would do in your first 14 days to reduce disputes in a Google Ads fashion dropshipping store.



Excited to hear from you. Thank you.

mbers accountable during daily syncs and throughout the workday to ensure tasks are completed on time

title: Real Estate Operations & Marketing Manager
description:
Houston Homeownership Blueprint™



We are building a media-driven real estate brand focused on helping Houston-area homeowners and buyers navigate the market with clear strategy and data.



Our goal is to run a highly organized, system-driven real estate business where the agent focuses on clients and revenue while the backend operations run smoothly.



We are looking for a highly organized Real Estate Operations & Marketing Assistant to help manage systems, marketing, and lead follow-up.



This is not a basic assistant role.

You will help operate the engine behind the business.



Your Mission



Your role is to help ensure that:



• leads are responded to quickly

• marketing is executed consistently

• systems stay organized

• nothing falls through the cracks



You will work directly with the agent to support the Houston Homeownership Blueprint™ marketing and client systems.



Core Responsibilities

Lead Management & CRM



• Respond to new online leads quickly

• Manage and update leads in the CRM (GoHighLevel)

• Send follow-up messages and schedule appointments

• Track lead status and keep the pipeline organized



Marketing & Content Support



• Schedule and publish Google Business Profile posts

• Schedule social media content

• Upload content into marketing systems

• Maintain the content calendar



Landing Pages & Campaign Support



• Assist with creating and updating landing pages

• Support marketing campaigns and funnels

• Gather market data for posts and reports



Marketing Outreach



• Coordinate and schedule mailers

• Maintain marketing lists and contact databases

• Assist with basic PR or outreach tasks

title: A/B Testing Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an experienced A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to help us scale our e-commerce brands through data-driven experimentation.



You’ll be responsible for planning, executing, and analyzing A/B tests across landing pages, product pages, offers, creatives, and funnels — turning insights into clear, actionable improvements.



Experience in the beauty or skincare niche is a strong bonus.



What You’ll Do

Design and run A/B and multivariate tests across:

Product pages (PDPs)

Landing pages

Funnels & checkout flows

Offers, pricing, and bundles

Copy, layouts, and UX elements

Develop clear test hypotheses based on data, user behavior, and psychology

Analyze results and translate data into clear recommendations

Prioritize tests based on potential impact and effort

Collaborate with design, marketing, and content teams

Continuously improve conversion rates, AOV, and revenue



What We’re Looking For:

Proven experience running high-volume A/B tests for e-commerce brands

Strong understanding of CRO, user behavior, and conversion psychology

Hands-on experience with A/B testing and analytics tools (e.g. GA4, Hotjar, VWO, Convert, Optimizely, or similar)

Ability to explain results clearly — not just the numbers, but the why

Detail-oriented, structured, and highly analytical

Self-driven and comfortable owning experiments end-to-end



Nice to Have (Bonus):

Experience in beauty, skincare, or wellness e-commerce

Experience using Intelligems (pricing tests, offers, bundles, subscriptions)

Familiarity with Shopify ecosystems

Experience optimizing for Meta Ads / TikTok traffic

Understanding of subscription models and bundles

Experience working with UGC-driven funnels



Please send us your portfolio link when you apply.



Thanks!

title: Online Sales Assistant
description:
Online Sales Chat Representative – Full Time | Age $3/ph Base Salary + 3% Commission Pay with The Best Additional Performance Incentives/Bonuses [ ONLY APPLY IF YOUR AGED BETWEEN 18 - 24 ]



Are you a young, driven, fast learner with strong English skills eager to and a natural talent for building relationships? Do you enjoy working in sales and helping people make confident buying decisions? If so, we want you on our team!

We’re hiring Online Sales Chat Representatives to engage with customers through live chat, build rapport, and close sales using our proven (and easy-to-learn) system. You’ll be trained to recognize key buyer behaviors that help us close sales faster and more efficiently.



What You Get:



- Guaranteed $3% per hour base salary with 3% Commission triggered on all sales you make – No cap on earnings. The more you sell, the more you earn.

- Performance-Based Bonuses – Meaning extra rewards and top tier earnings available for you high achievers!

- Full-Time, Long-Term Role – Secure consistent work organised with our SMART SHIFT SETUP that allow you to experience BIG EARNINGS while enjoying your quality TIME OFF.

- On the Job Training – We teach you our unique, high-converting sales system.

- Supportive Team – You’ll never feel like just a number. We invest in your success.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring chat agents. We’re looking for quick learners who can master our system and spot patterns in customer behavior to close more deals. You’ll need:

- Excellent written English and strong grammar and quick type speed.

- High emotional intelligence and ability to build trust fast.

- Sharp attention to detail – we teach you how to recognize buyer signals.

- A desire to grow, learn, and improve your skills.

- A reliable computer and fast internet connection.



Your Daily Tasks:



- Chat with customers in real time to help them make purchase decisions.

- Follow our proven script framework while adapting to each customer’s style.

- Spot behaviours or messages that tell you what the customer really wants.

- Overcome objections with empathy and confidence.

- Log chat details and update notes on customers using CRM

- Work closely with our team to share insights and celebrate wins.



Shift Availability - We currently have 4 positions available:



- Day + Night Shifts Available

- 12 Hour Shifts - (1 Day on 1 Day Off Rotating Shift Pattern)



Let us know your preferred shift when you apply. Once assigned, your shift stays consistent.



Why Work With Us?

We’re not just another Sales Team. We’re building a team of high-performers who are excited to learn, earn, and grow. If you want to level up your career and get rewarded for your results—not just your hours—this is your chance.

Apply today and let’s build something amazing together. ????

title: Accountant
description:
About Us

We are a growing U.S.-based structural engineering company that has built our success on the incredible talent we've found here on OnlineJobs.ph. We currently have four amazing full-time Filipino tea
mbers who have been with us long-term, and we're looking to add a strategic accounting leader to become our fifth core tea
mber.



We don't recruit anywhere else—this platform has consistently delivered exceptional professionals who’ve become integral to our company culture. We value loyalty, growth, and treating our team like family.



The Opportunity

This isn't just a bookkeeping job. We're looking for an experienced accountant who can architect and run our entire accounting function from scratch, then potentially grow into a leadership role managing bookkeepers and accountants for multiple small businesses in our network.



Phase 1 (Months 1-6): Build the foundation

Phase 2 (6+ months): Scale into an Accounting Department Manager role with direct reports



What You’ll Do

Immediate Priorities:



Set up and manage our complete accounting system (QuickBooks Online/Xero) from the ground up

Handle full-cycle bookkeeping: AP/AR, payroll (4 Filipino employees + 1 U.S.), reconciliations, and month/year-end close

Ensure U.S. tax compliance and work with our U.S. CPA for annual filings

Create financial reports, cash flow projections, and job costing specific to engineering projects

Implement efficient processes, automation, and internal controls

Growth Track (6+ months):



Hire, train, and manage a team of bookkeepers/accountants

Potentially manage accounting for 2-3 additional small business clients

Develop standardized accounting SOPs and quality control systems

Act as Finance Director/Controller advising on business decisions

Who You Are

Must-Haves:



5+ years of accounting experience (public accounting or industry experience preferred)

Expert-level QuickBooks Online or Xero proficiency

Experience with U.S. accounting standards and small business tax requirements

Proven track record of building or reorganizing accounting systems (not just maintaining them)

Leadership mindset—you're comfortable making decisions and eventually managing others

Excellent English communication (written and verbal) for client and CPA interactions

Reliable high-speed internet and backup power

Nice-to-Haves:



Experience with engineering/construction industry accounting (job costing, progress billing)

Payroll processing experience (Gusto, ADP, or similar)

Previous experience managing remote teams

CPA or equivalent certification (not required but valued)

Why Join Us?

Real Career Growth: Start as our accounting lead, grow into a department manager. We want someone who sees this as their long-term career home.

Stability: We're established, profitable, and committed to our Filipino team. Our current tea
mbers have been with us for [X years—insert your actual tenure].

Autonomy: You'll own the accounting function. No micromanaging—we hire experts and trust them to do their jobs.

Competitive Compensation: Above-market salary for the Philippines (range: PHP [insert range] depending on experience) + annual performance bonuses

Benefits: Paid vacation, Philippine holidays off, flexible scheduling, and professional development budget for certifications

Culture: We’re a tight-knit team that respects work-life balance. You’re not a "vendor"—you’re a valued tea
mber.

To Apply

Please send your application with the subject line: "Accounting Architect – [Your Name]"



Include:



Your updated resume/CV

A brief video intro (2-3 mins) telling us about a time you improved or built an accounting system from scratch

Your expected monthly salary range

Answer this question: "If you were to join us, what would be the first three things you'd implement in our accounting department?"

Note: We value attention to detail. Please mention the word "blueprint" somewhere in your application so we know you read the entire post.



We’re excited to meet the person who will help us build the financial backbone of our company. If you’re looking for a stable, long-term role where you can truly make your mark and grow into a leadership position, we want to hear from you.



Only applicants through OnlineJobs.ph will be considered. We look forward to welcoming you to our team!

title: Social Media Operator — Earn $1,500-$2,000+/month — Base + 15% Commission on Every Sale You Generate
description:
???? THIS IS NOT A NORMAL VA JOB. This is a performance-based role where the harder you work, the more you earn.

We're a fast-growing e-commerce company doing $250K+/month. We need someone to build and run social media accounts that drive traffic and sales to our store.

Base salary: $400-$600/month

Commission: 15% of every sale that comes from YOUR accounts and content

Top performers will earn $1,500-$2,000+/month total

The math is simple: if your content drives $10,000 in sales this month, you earn $1,500 commission on top of your base. The more accounts you run, the more content you post, the more you earn. No cap.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

You'll create and run social media accounts across multiple platforms. You post content every day that drives people to buy on our store. Every sale tracked back to your content = you earn 15%.

Platforms:



TikTok — short faceless videos (no face needed, text + stock footage + AI voiceover)

Instagram — carousels, reels, theme pages

YouTube Shorts — same faceless videos repurposed

Pinterest — pins, boards, SEO-optimized

Reddit — helpful posts and answers in relevant communities

Quora — answers to questions people ask about social media growth

/X — threads and posts

Medium — articles that rank on Google



Your daily work:



Create 10-20 pieces of content per day using Canva, CapCut, and AI tools

Post across all your accounts — target: 30-50 posts per day total

Create and manage multiple accounts per platform, in different languages (we'll provide translation tools and AI)

Engage with comments, answer DMs, interact with other accounts to grow yours

Track every link with UTM codes so we can see exactly which sales come from you

If an account gets banned, create a new one and keep going



Content examples (we'll provide templates):



Carousels: "5 ways to grow your Instagram fast"

Short videos: screen recording showing follower growth + AI voiceover explaining how

Reddit posts: "I tested a growth service, here's my honest review" (genuine, helpful, not spammy)

Pinterest pins: "Instagram Growth Tips 2026" linking to our site

Articles: "How to get 10K followers on Instagram in 2026"





NO EXPERIENCE REQUIRED. Here's what matters:



You're hungry and want to earn more than a normal VA salary

You're willing to learn — we'll teach you everything (Canva, CapCut, AI tools, posting strategies)

You're fast — you can produce content quickly once you learn the system

You're consistent — you post every single day, no exceptions

You're resilient — accounts get banned sometimes, you don't panic, you rebuild

You're organized — you'll manage many accounts and you can't lose track

You're comfortable with basic technology — if you can use a phone and a laptop, you can do this

You have a reliable internet connection and a computer



Bonus (not required but nice):



You've used Canva before

You've managed social media accounts (even your own personal ones count)

You speak multiple languages

You've done any kind of online marketing





HOW THE COMMISSION WORKS:

Every account you create gets a unique tracking link (we set this up for you). When someone clicks your link and buys on our store, the sale is tracked to you. You earn 15% of that sale.

Real examples of what you can earn:



You post a TikTok that gets 50K views ? 200 people click ? 20 people buy ? average order $60 ? $1,200 in sales ? you earn $180 from one video

You write a Reddit post that ranks on Google ? it drives 10 sales per week ? $600/week in sales ? you earn $90/week from one post forever

You run 10 Pinterest boards driving 5 sales per day ? $300/day in sales ? you earn $45/day = $1,350/month just from Pinterest

You post a carousel on Instagram that goes semi-viral ? 30 sales over a month ? $1,800 in sales ? you earn $270 from one carousel



The more accounts and content you create, the more passive income you build. Old posts keep driving sales weeks and months after you publish them. Your income compounds over time.

Monthly earning potential:



Month 1 (learning): $
base + $
commission = $600-$1,100

Month 2-3 (ramping up): $
base + $800-$1,500 commission = $1,200-$2,100

Month 4+ (full speed): $
base + $1,500-$3,000+ commission = $1,900-$3,600+





TOOLS WE'LL PROVIDE / TEACH YOU:



Canva Pro (free for you) — create carousels, pins, thumbnails

CapCut (free) — edit short videos

ChatGPT / AI tools — generate content ideas, write captions, translate to any language

ElevenLabs — AI voiceover in any language (no need to record your voice)

Residential proxies — to post from different countries safely

Tracking system — so every sale you generate is tracked and credited to you

Templates — we give you proven content templates that work, you just adapt them

Training — first week is fully guided, we show you exactly how to do everything





YOUR KPIS:



Content posted per day: minimum 30 across all platforms

Accounts active: maintain as many as possible (more accounts = more traffic = more commission)

Sales tracked to your content per week: this directly determines your bonus

Daily report in Slack: what you posted, on which accounts, how many clicks/views, any accounts banned/created





DAILY ROUTINE:



9:00-11:00 — Batch create content: carousels in Canva, short videos in CapCut, write Reddit/Quora posts using AI

title: Product Research & Market Analyst (Helium10, Keepa, Junglescout)
description:
About Us

We're a pan-Asian sourcing consultancy connecting Western clinics and brands with manufacturers across China, Korea, Japan, and the Philippines. We specialize in professional skincare, cosmetics, and wellness products.



We're expanding into three parallel channels:



Distribution — brands are approaching us to distribute their products in Western markets

White Label — sourcing existing formulations from Asian manufacturers and branding for our clients

Custom Formulation — working with OEM/ODM manufacturers to develop proprietary products



We need someone who can identify which products are worth pursuing across all three channels.



The Role

You'll be our product intelligence engine — researching market demand, analyzing competitive landscapes, and producing actionable recommendations on which products to distribute, white label, or develop.

This is NOT a PPC or advertising role. This is research, analysis, and opportunity identification.



Core Responsibilities

Amazon & Marketplace Analysis



*Identify winning and trending products in skincare, beauty, and wellness categories using tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or Keepa

*Analyze Best Seller Rank (BSR), revenue estimates, review velocity, and pricing trends

*Identify gaps and underserved niches (high demand + low competition + weak listings)

*Track seasonal trends and emerging ingredient/product trends (e.g., peptide serums, EMS devices, LED masks)



Distribution Evaluation



When brands approach us for distribution, assess their product-market fit for Western markets (US, Australia, Singapore, UAE)

Evaluate brand strength, existing Amazon presence, pricing positioning, and competitive landscape

Produce a GO / NO-GO recommendation with supporting data



White Label & Custom Formulation Opportunity Assessment



Identify product categories where white label or custom formulation offers better margins than distribution

Estimate landed cost vs. market price to model margin potential

Research existing OEM/ODM capabilities from our supplier network (China, Korea, Japan, Philippines)

Flag formulation trends worth developing (e.g., "glass skin" serums, exosome skincare, cica products)



Competitive Intelligence



Monitor competitor brands, new product launches, and pricing shifts

Track Amazon algorithm changes, category trends, and review patterns

Build and maintain a product opportunity pipeline with scoring/ranking





What You'll Deliver (Weekly)



Product Opportunity Report — 3-5 vetted product opportunities ranked by potential, with data backing each recommendation

Brand Evaluation Briefs — When brands approach us, a 1-page assessment with GO/NO-GO recommendation

Trend Alerts — Quick flags on emerging ingredients, viral products, or category shifts worth watching

Competitive Snapshots — Monthly overview of competitor movements in our key categories





Required Skills & Experience

Must Have:



2+ years experience in Amazon product research or e-commerce market analysis

Proficiency with product research tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, or similar)

Understanding of BSR, revenue estimation, keyword demand analysis, and review analysis

Ability to model basic unit economics (landed cost, margin, breakeven)

Strong written communication — you'll produce reports, not just spreadsheets

Self-directed and comfortable working asynchronously



Strong Preference:



Experience in beauty, skincare, cosmetics, or wellness product categories

Understanding of white label vs. private label vs. custom formulation business models

Familiarity with sourcing from Asia (China, Korea, Japan) — manufacturing costs, MOQs, lead times

Experience evaluating brands for distribution or retail partnerships

Knowledge of FDA cosmetic regulations or international cosmetic compliance (bonus, not required)



Tools You Should Know (some or all):



Helium 10 (Black Box, Cerebro, Magnet)

Jungle Scout or similar

Keepa / CamelCamelCamel

Google Sheets / Excel for data modeling

Amazon Brand Analytics (if you've had seller access)

------------------------

How to Apply

Please include:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role fits your experience

Tool experience — which product research tools you've used and for how long

A sample analysis — Pick any skincare or beauty product currently in Amazon's top 100 for its subcategory. In 3-5 bullet points, tell us:



What's the estimated monthly revenue?

Who are the top 3 competitors?

Is there a white label or private label opportunity here? Why or why not?

What would you recommend we do with this product (distribute, white label, skip)?





Availability — hours per week (time slots and approximate hours) and timez
Type: Part-time (potential to scale as needed)

Hours: 10-15 hrs/week to start, scaling to 20+



Location: Remote (any timezone, async-friendly)

Communication: Slack + weekly async check-in

Start: Immediate

title: Experienced HR Associate (Onboarding & Compliance)
description:
Job Title: HR Associate (Onboarding & Compliance)**



Company: HomeLogic Healthcare

Location: Remote 

Employment Type: Full
 9pm EST - 4pm EST

Required 2- 3 years experience 

This is NOT an ENTRY Level Role. Do not APPLY if you do not have direct experience or intend to work multiple jobs at once during working hours. 



Position Overview



HomeLogic Healthcare is seeking a detail-oriented, highly organized, and dependable HR Associate (Onboarding & Compliance) to support the onboarding of nurses and caregivers while ensuring full regulatory compliance.



This role is critical to maintaining the integrity of our hiring processes and ensuring that all clinical staff meet required standards before working in client homes 



The ideal candidate is a strong communicator, highly organized, reliable, and thrives in a fast-paced healthcare environment where accuracy and accountability are non-negotiable.



-ey Responsibilities



1. New Hire Onboarding



* Manage the end-to-end onboarding process for all nurses and caregivers

* Ensure all onboarding documentation is completed accurately and on time

* Facilitate onboarding communication and provide a positive new hire experience

* Coordinate start dates in collaboration with the scheduling team





-. Compliance & Credentialing



Verify and track all required documentation prior to hire, including:



  * Background checks (**must be completed before first shift**)

  * Nursing licenses (active and verified through state systems)

  * Certifications (CPR/BLS and other required credentials)

* Maintain accurate, complete, and audit-ready employee records

* Ensure compliance with Georgia Medicaid (GAPP) and home healthcare regulations

* Immediately flag and escalate missing, expired, or incomplete documentation





3. Background Check Management



* Initiate and monitor background checks for all new hires

* Ensure zero tolerance for missed or incomplete checks prior to placement

* Proactively follow up with vendors and candidates to avoid delays





4. Client Support (CPR Certification Assistance)



* Assist clients and caregivers with obtaining CPR certification when required

* Provide guidance on approved training providers

* Track completion and maintain proper documentation





5. Documentation & Systems Management



* Upload and maintain all onboarding documents within company systems (EMR/HR platforms)

* Ensure documentation is consistently accurate, complete, and audit-ready

* Support preparation for audits, reviews, and surveys





6. Cross-Functional Coordination



* Collaborate closely with:



  * Intake Team

  * Scheduling Team

  * Nursing Supervisors

* Provide daily updates on onboarding and compliance status

* Ensure staff are fully cleared **before being scheduled in homes





7. Process Improvement



* Identify gaps in onboarding and compliance workflows

* Recommend and implement improvements to prevent errors

* Maintain and update onboarding checklists and SOPs





Key Performance Indicators (KPIs)



100% compliance:** No caregiver or nurse starts without a completed background check

Onboarding turnaround time:** ? 3–5 days from offer to clearance

License verification accuracy:** 100%

CPR certification completion rate:** 100% (when required)

Audit readiness:All files complete at all times

Response time: ? 24 hours





Qualifications



* 1–3 years of experience in HR, onboarding, or healthcare administration

* **Previous experience in a home health environment strongly preferred

* Strong understanding of compliance, credentialing, and documentation processes

* Exceptional attention to detail and organizational skills

* Ability to manage multiple priorities and meet deadlines

* Proficiency with technology, document management systems, and background check platforms





Required Attributes



* **Excellent Communication Skills: Clear, professional, and responsive with staff, families, and leadership

* **Highly Organized: Able to manage multiple onboarding files simultaneously without errors

* **Reliable & Dependable: Consistently follows through and meets deadlines

* **Accountable: Takes ownership of compliance-critical responsibilities

* **Detail-Oriented: Maintains accuracy in all documentation

* **Sense of Urgency: Moves quickly while maintaining precision



---



## **Why This Role Matters**



This role directly protects HomeLogic Healthcare from compliance risks while ensuring families receive safe, qualified care. The HR Associate is a key safeguard in maintaining the company’s reputation, operational excellence, and regulatory standing.



---



Compensation & Benefits



* Competitive salary (based on experience)

* Paid time off

* Flexible work environment

* Growth opportunities within HomeLogic Healthcare

title: YouTube Expert Strategist Needed
description:
About us

We run a YouTube entertainment business across multiple channels. We have previously built a YouTube channel to over 300,000 subscribers, and we are now building new channels from scratch. 

We create highly engaging entertainment content and are looking for someone with strong, well-rounded YouTube experience who can support our CEO with the many different kinds of work that touch YouTube.



How you’ll work with us

The CEO leads the business. This role is not to run every part of the company alone, and not to personally own every single step of every video unless that’s what we agree together. 



We need someone who can assist the CEO with research, ideation, and judgment, bounce ideas, pressure-test concepts, and help us think through how to create content that is worthy of breaking out—including what strong performance and “viral potential” actually mean for our niches and channels.



You should understand YouTube from start to finish: how discovery and packaging work, what makes ideas strong or weak, and how to think about consistent, high-quality entertainment across multiple channels. 



You should be comfortable supporting both strategy and practical creation (e.g. research, outlines, packaging feedback), while recognizing the CEO makes the final calls.



What we’re looking for (in order of importance)

Deep YouTube expertise — Real experience across the full scope of YouTube work: research, content and packaging thinking, and how videos are planned and improved—not only one narrow task.



Ability to work with a founder/CEO — Clear communication, fast thinking, honest feedback, and real collaboration.



Bonus (valued, not required): Video editing and graphic design — we give extra consideration to candidates who can also deliver hands-on editing or visuals, but the core hire is YouTube judgment and expertise.



Requirements

Demonstrable YouTube experience — show channels, videos, or projects where you’ve had a real impact, and what you did.

Portfolio / links required — applications without relevant examples will not be considered.

Strong written English; short video calls when needed.

Reliable internet and professional communication.



Compensation

Negotiable — based on experience, expertise, and scope of responsibility (to be discussed with shortlisted candidates).

Hiring process



We will review applications, conduct interviews, and may invite finalists to a small paid test (brief and fair) so we can see how you think and work with us.



How to apply

IMPORTANT: Start your application subject line with the word YTEXPERT555 so we know you read this posting in full. Applications without this will not be reviewed.



Please include:

1. Resume or CV

2 Portfolio / links — YouTube channels or videos relevant to your experience; note your role on each (required).

3. Your YouTube background — niches, types of content, and how you’ve helped build or improve channels or videos (metrics or outcomes if you can share them).

4. How you would support a CEO running multiple entertainment channels — short paragraph (a few sentences).

5. Your view on what makes YouTube content capable of going viral or breaking out — be specific; avoid generic motivational answers.

6. Rank your own skills (required) — For each item below, give one number from 1 to 10 (1 = weakest / least experience, 10 = strongest / most experience). Do not skip any line.

- Topic and trend research

- Script writing (hooks, structure, pacing)

- Thumbnail and packaging thinking (titles, thumbnails, concepts)

- Video editing

- Graphic design

7. Availability — timezone, hours per week, earliest start date.

8. Salary expectation — even though our offer is negotiable, share what you’re looking for in USD per month so we can align early.

title: POSITION HAS BEEN FILLED! --- Video Editor for Long-Form Storytelling YouTube Channel !!!
description:
POSITION HAS BEEN FILLED!!!



Skilled YouTube video editor needed who specializes in high-quality long-form ‘faceless’ storytelling videos.    (Intermediate / Expert Level, sorry no beginners.)  



This is not basic editing. Our videos rely on strong hooks, fun and fast-paced emotional storytelling along with some animation, with pacing that is engaging to keep viewers watching.  If you understand how to build curiosity in the first 15 seconds and maintain retention throughout the video, this job may be the perfect fit for you.   The Niche that you will be working in will be focused on Animals within the Cryptid or Cryptozoology niche (this has NOTHING to do with the Crypto money niche).



This will be a good ‘fit’ for you if you:

• Like the ability to work on your own at your own home or café.  

• Like the fact that you can work within your own Time Zone (PST/PhST/PHT).

• Like the fact that your stable, full-time monthly salary is paid reliably on-schedule via EasyPay coupled with Payoneer (the method of payment through OnlineJobs.ph) or possibly through 
.

• Like the fact that you can become eligible for our ‘13th-Month Payment’ after 90 days of employment (prorated based on your exact start date).

• Like the fact that this is a long-term role for someone who wants full-time, stable, remote work with a clear purpose and consistent hours.

• Like the fact that this is a flexible, output-based working environment.  As long as deadlines and quality are strictly met and communication is clear, we do not micromanage your daily hours.

• Have the understanding that Speed does not replace Quality. The final videos must still be high quality and polished, but yet must be done in a timely manner.

• Have the Drive and Ability to work under deadlines, manage projects independently, and communicate effectively with me.

• Have the Ability to craft narrative-driven content that keeps viewers engaged from the first 15 seconds to the final frame… then this is for you.

• and if you know that you have the ‘abilities’ and ‘creativity’ to complete these videos as requested… if someone would just give you the chance…   then this is for you.



I Will Provide:

• Full complete Scripts along with full Voiceover Narration of each of the Scripts.

• Five of my channel’s completed videos that you can study and see EXACTLY what is expected for your editing.   I have a specific "vibe" and editing rhythm, and I need someone who can study my existing content and replicate that style consistently going forward.   This will provide you with Clear direction on tone, pacing, ‘hook’ placements, images needed, desired visual style, and more.

• Feedback, respect, and encouragement as you complete your editing.  I fully respect the work that you are providing.



What You Will Do:

• Edit long-form faceless YouTube videos (10–16 minutes on average – it can be more, it can be less).

• Create very engaging visual hooks in the first 15 seconds with ongoing hooks throughout the videos.

• Ability to create movements and animation for the animated ‘Character’ that narrates throughout (Rigging is provided, you’ll be animating some arm, hand, leg, mouth and facial movements).  He is generally to the side of the screen as the story is being told/narrated.

• Create and Add simple animations, transitions, background changes, images, motion graphics, and sounds and sound effects throughout to enhance the provided story.   You will match visual pacing with the narration.

• Maintain viewer engagement throughout the entire video – from beginning to the final end.

• Able to interact with me with Responsive communication: Able to confirm receipt of scripts and voiceover narrations, able to ask clarifying questions, able to provide timely status updates, able to meet agreed-upon deadlines on a consistent basis, etc.



Editing Software examples (any of these is fine):

• Adobe Premiere Pro

• After Effects

• DaVinci Resolve

• Final Cut Pro

• (or equivalent)



Compensation:

• Type: Full-Time (40 Hours/Week).

• Location: Working Remotely (Philippines).

• Salary Range:  30,000 to 50,000 PHP per month (Negotiable based on portfolio quality, abilities/experience, timeliness of video delivery, and commitment to number of videos completed).   We can also discuss alternative preferences such as $XX per ‘Video’ or $XX per ‘Minute of Video’.   

• You will know your exact Compensation amount prior to Hiring.



How to Apply:

I receive a high volume of applications for the positions that I post. To ensure I’m reviewing candidates who possess the high attention to detail required for professional video editing, please follow these instructions perfectly.  Please do not just send a generic resume. To be considered, please include ALL of the following in your application:

1. • An introduction explaining your experience with long-form video editing.

2. • Send me your portfolio – include at least two or three (or more) long-form YouTube videos that YOU personally edited that will display your best abilities.   Don’t send me someone else’s work.  YouTube links or downloadable files preferred – preferably in the storytelling niche.

3. • Tell me about the video editing software you will be using and your experience level with it. 

4. • On a scale of 1 through 10 (with 10 being ‘Fluently), how would you rate yourself in communicating in English (both spoken and written)?

5. • Please Note:  Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a 3- to 4-minute ‘paid trial edit’ (I will pay for it.)   (Script & Voiceover will be provided.)

6. • Please confirm that you are not from an agency or a team.  Only Solo freelancers will be considered.   

7. • To make sure you’ve read this entire job post, write the word ‘Bigfoot’ at the beginning of your application.   Applications without this word will not be considered.



As a recap, I am looking for someone who understands how to turn a story into a powerful visual experience.  

 

I need a long-form YouTube editor who can deliver in the style that I’ve defined, both on-time and to a high standard. If you’re reliable, detail-oriented, and able to begin immediately, I want to hear from you.     



Thank you,  Wes

title: Video Editor: Short/Long Form
description:
We’re seeking a skilled and creative freelance Video Editor to produce high-quality short-form promotional product/recap videos edits and long-form podcast edits. In this role, you will take provided footage and transform it into polished, engaging videos that align with our brand and creative direction. This role is strictly focused on editing, creativity, and execution. Your primary role will be to help bring the raw footage provided to "life" to help grab the viewers attention.



Typically video edits:



Short-Form Video Editing (10–15 seconds): Primarily for social media channels



-Create fast-paced, music video-style edits(quick and flashy) with strong rhythm and motion

-Use on-beat cuts, motion transitions, and dynamic visual effects

-Incorporate product shots, typography, branding, and call-to-actions and relevant b-roll

-Maintain consistent color correction and grading

-Vertical Orientation 

-These edits could include: Product release trailers, event recaps, tour recaps, talking heads, and etc

-Turnaround:1-2 business days



Podcast Video Editing (15–20 minutes): Primarily for Youtube channels



-Sync and edit multi-camera footage (A-cam and B-cam)

-Remove pauses, mistakes, and unnecessary content

-Switch camera angles based on speaker and flow

-Add B-roll,Comedic B-roll, light graphics, and minimal transitions

-Ensure clean audio and consistent visuals

-Horizontal Orientation 

-These edits could include: Podcast, vlogs, etc 

Turnaround: 3-4 business days



General Responsibilities:

-Organize and review provided footage

-Execute edits efficiently while maintaining quality

-Add visual effects, transitions, and b roll when needed

-Deliver final videos in 4K (.mp4 format)

-Upload completed files that are ready to post for our clients portal in our systems



Required Skills:

-Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro and After Effects

-Basic AI video software knowledge/how to make visuals using ai

-Strong understanding of pacing, rhythm, transitions/effects, and visual storytelling

-Experience with color correction and grading

-Ability to work quickly under tight deadlines



Ideal Candidate:

-Experienced in fast-paced or social media-style editing

-Detail-oriented with strong visual instincts

-Able to follow creative direction while adding personal style and creative input

-Reliable and efficient in a deadline-driven environment



Compensation:

-Will be based on skill level and turnaround times

-Starting rate: $800 per month - $1250 per month 

-Work loads will typically be 20-35 hours weekly 



How to Apply

-Submit one portfolio link showcasing your best video editing work.

-Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

-Shortlisted candidates will be asked to complete a brief test edit to assess skill level and determine appropriate compensation.

title: Elite Virtual Assistant for Job Applications & Recruiter Outreach (Results-Driven Only)
description:
Elite Virtual Assistant for Job Applications & Recruiter Outreach (Results-Driven Only)



?



Who This Role Is For



This is not a basic VA role.



This is for someone who:

 • Thinks like a recruiter, not a task-taker

 • Writes clearly, persuasively, and fast

 • Uses AI tools but verifies everything

 • Takes ownership of results, not just activity



You will be working inside my personal accounts. Precision, trust, and consistency matter.



If you need constant supervision or cut corners, this will not work.



?



Responsibilities

 • Apply to jobs daily using:

 • LinkedIn

 • Indeed

 • ZipRecruiter

 • Customize resume for every job

 • Write tailored cover letters

 • Message recruiters and hiring managers

 • Track every action in Excel or Google Sheets

 • Track all hours worked for payment purposes

 • Optimize for ATS systems

 • Continuously improve based on results



Note: Full responsibilities and workflows will be expanded upon in the interview.



?



Daily Output Expectations (KPIs)

 • 25–40 high-quality applications per day

 • 100% customized applications

 • 1–2 recruiter messages per application

 • 100% tracking accuracy (no missing entries)



Performance Targets:

 • 10–20% interview rate

 • 15%+ recruiter response rate



?



Tools & Systems

 • My accounts:

 • LinkedIn

 • Indeed

 • ZipRecruiter

 •

 • Excel or Google Sheets (mandatory tracking system)

 • AI tools (ChatGPT or similar)



AI Rule:

 • You can use AI for speed

 • You must manually review and fix all outputs

 • No robotic or incorrect content



?



Accountability & Communication (Non-Negotiable)

 • Daily live check-in meeting (time will be set)

 • End-of-day recap required every day, including:

 • Total applications submitted

 • Recruiter messages sent

 • Responses received

 • Interviews booked

 • Hours worked that day

 • Issues or blockers

 • What you will improve tomorrow



Failure to report = performance issue.



?



Compensation + Bonus Structure

 • Base: $4–$8/hour

 • Hours must be tracked accurately in the spreadsheet for payment



Estimated Weekly Pay (Based on Performance):

 • Entry-level: $120–$200/week

 • Solid performer: $200–$350/week

 • High performer: $350–$600+/week



Bonuses:

 • $10–$25 per interview booked

 • $100–$300 per job offer accepted



Pay is based on:

 1. Hours worked (tracked and verified)

 2. Quality of output

 3. Results achieved



?



Role Structure (Important)

 • This role is month-to-month

 • Continuation is based strictly on performance and results

 • Responsibilities may expand or change based on performance

 • High performers earn more responsibility and pay

 • Low performance = immediate replacement



?



Non-Negotiables

 • No copy-paste applications

 • No unchecked AI output

 • No missing tracking data

 • No inaccurate or inflated hour tracking

 • Must attend daily meetings

 • Must send end-of-day recap

 • Must follow instructions exactly

 • Must maintain confidentiality



Dishonest time tracking or low-quality work will result in immediate termination.



?



Screening Questions (Required)

 1. Show a before/after resume bullet you improved

 2. How would you complete 30 applications in one day without losing quality?

 3. Write a short recruiter outreach message

 4. How do you use AI tools while ensuring accuracy?

 5. What is your expected hourly rate?



Attention + Bot Test:

Include the phrase “Acorn Apple” in your application and the word “Precision” in your second sentence or you will not be considered.



?



Trial Task (Required)



You will be given 1 real job posting.



You must:

 • Customize a resume

 • Write a cover letter

 • Draft recruiter outreach

 • Show tracking entry in spreadsheet



AI is allowed, but final work must be clean and accurate.



?



Google Sheets / Excel Tracking Structure

 • Date Applied

 • Company Name

 • Job Title

 • Job Link

 • Platform

 • Resume Version

 • Cover Letter

 • Recruiter Name

 • Recruiter Contacted (Yes/No)

 • Outreach Message

 • Status

 • Notes

 • Hours Worked (Daily Total)



?



Daily Workflow SOP



1. Job Selection

 • Identify strong roles



2. Resume Customization

 • Use AI if needed

 • Manually refine



3. Cover Letter

 • Keep it short and relevant



4. Apply

 • Submit clean applications



5. Recruiter Outreach

 • Send personalized messages



6. Track Everything + Hours

 • Log actions AND hours in real time



7. Daily Meeting

 • Review progress



8. End-of-Day Recap

 • Include results + hours worked



?



Now you’ve locked in:

 • Time accountability

 • Performance accountability

 • Payment clarity

title: Social Media VA
description:
Social Media Assistant – CGarcia Fitness



Part-Time | Remote

About the Role



CGarcia Fitness is looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Social Media Assistant to handle the administrative side of content posting. This is a pure execution role — no creative input, no editing, no strategy. You upload, schedule, and publish. That’s the job.

What You’ll Do

 ? Upload and schedule pre-edited videos and graphics to TikTok, Instagram Reels, and other designated platforms

What You Won’t Do

 ? Communicates clearly and proactively

 ? Available to check in daily or on a set schedule

Hours & Compensation

Flexible, estimated 5-15 hours per week depending on posting volume. Compensation negotiable based on experience.

title: Executive Assistant – Business Operations & Outreach
description:
WHO AM I?



I’m Drew, the founder of Sealwright LLC. I’m building something from the ground up and I need help. My educational and professional background is in computer engineering and mathematics. I have been researching artificial intelligence as a hobby and now I use AI tools daily to plan, strategize, and manage operations. I move fast and think in big pictures. I’m direct: I’ll tell you exactly what I need, give you the tools to do it, and trust you to get it done.



WHAT IS MY COMPANY?



Sealwright is a business services company based in New York. We help people form businesses, handle document services, and we’re expanding into new verticals. We’re early. We’re growing. This isn’t a giant corporation, you’re joining me. Right now it’s a one-person operation and you would be the first hire. That means you’ll touch everything. You’ll learn how this business works from the inside out. As we grow, so does your role.



WHO ARE YOU?



You’re my first full-time hire. You are the first “face” of the company to the outside world. You want to be here long-term. You want to learn. You want to grow with a company that’s just getting started.



Requirements:

 - Strong written and spoken English: natural, confident, professional

 - Comfortable on the phone with US companies, government offices, and service providers

 - Strong internet and technology skills: web research,
, web forms, spreadsheets

 - Able to own a task from start to finish: receive it, figure out how to approach it, execute, and report back with a clear summary of what happened and what’s next

 - Comfortable owning a project from beginning to end, not just individual tasks, but seeing something through from “we need this done” all the way to “it’s done, here’s what happened”

 - Comfortable working independently, but this is a team, you’re not expected to know everything and you’re expected to speak up when you don’t

 - Not afraid to talk to me. Ask questions. Push back if something doesn’t make sense. Tell me when something went wrong. I’d rather hear “I’m stuck” than find out a week later that nothing happened

 - Available full-time, dedicated to one employer

 - Reliable internet and a quiet space for phone calls



You want to be part of something that’s being built, not something that already exists.



HOW?



Send me a 1-2 minute voice recording walking me through how you would handle this:



I ask you to file a document (Form 99X-Example) with the New York State government. I don’t tell you which department to call, who to speak to, or how to file it. I just need it filed.



You also know the following: there’s a filing fee, but I haven’t told you how much. The form requires a supporting document that you’ll need to get from a different agency first.



Walk me through what you would do when you received this task. You don’t need to know anything about New York or its government, I just want to hear how you would figure it out. Form 99X-Example is fake. I’m not looking for the right answer, just to hear how you think and communicate. Please feel free to be yourself. This is more important than your resume.

Proficiency in Adobe Illustrator (basic to intermediate) for reviewing and understanding design files

?

Acorn Apple

?

?

?

?



Rules

?

?

title: Lead Manager VA — Real Estate Wholesaling
description:
About the Role

We are a growing real estate investment company looking for a proactive and reliable Lead Manager Virtual Assistant to join our team. This is a full-time, long-term position with real growth potential for the right person.

You will be the first point of contact with property owners. Your job is to respond to inbound messages, follow up with outbound leads, call sellers, gather key information, and keep our CRM pipeline organized and moving. When a seller shows strong interest in selling, you pass the qualified lead to the acquisitions manager for offers and negotiations.

This is not a role for someone who needs to be told every small step. If the situation is covered in our SOP, we expect you to execute confidently without asking for direction. We want someone who takes ownership, stays organized, and keeps the operation running smoothly even during high volume days.



About You

You have real experience working inside a real estate wholesaling or investment company. You have been on the phone with homeowners talking specifically about their property — their situation, their timeline, their motivation, and their price expectations.

General lead generation or customer service experience does not qualify for this role. If you have not spoken directly with homeowners about selling their property, this is not the right position for you.



Responsibilities



Respond to inbound SMS replies and classify every lead accurately using our CRM

Follow up with outbound leads from SMS marketing campaigns

Call sellers when additional information is needed

Qualify leads based on motivation, timeline, property condition, and price expectations

Update the CRM with clear and organized notes after every conversation

Move leads through the correct pipeline stages per our SOP

Maintain follow-up schedules and ensure no leads fall through the cracks

Manage 100+ leads and contacts daily without sacrificing quality or attention to detail

Handle high volumes of inbound SMS replies and outbound follow ups simultaneously while maintaining accuracy across all leads





Requirements



Real estate wholesaling or investment experience is required — general lead management or sales experience does not qualify

Must have direct experience speaking with homeowners about their property, situation, timeline, and price expectations

Clear and confident English communication — you will be speaking directly with property owners

Experience using GoHighLevel (GHL) specifically — not just general CRM experience

Experience handling SMS campaign responses and qualifying motivated sellers

Must be comfortable working independently through a full shift without constant check-ins

Must be available 10am to 5pm CST Monday through Friday

Takes initiative — if the SOP covers it, execute it without being asked

Reliable internet connection and professional work setup





What We Offer



Full-time stable position with consistent hours

Clear systems, SOPs, and processes already built — you are stepping into a machine that works

Growth potential into team lead or operations manager as the company scales

Long-term opportunity for the right person





How to Apply

To be considered please complete all five steps. Incomplete applications will not be reviewed.



Include the word LEADS at the top of your application so we know you read the entire post

Attach your resume — applications without a resume will not be considered

Send a 30–60 second voice recording introducing yourself — confidence and clarity on the recording matters because you will be speaking with sellers daily

Answer all three questions in writing:



— Describe your specific experience working inside a real estate wholesaling or investment company and what your role involved

— At your last position how many leads were you managing per day and what did a typical shift look like?

— Tell us about a time you had to solve a problem at work without being told exactly what to do



Include your timezone and available working hours



Applications missing the word LEADS, a resume, or a voice recording will not be reviewed.
