title: Admin and Property Researcher
description:
We are a growing company seeking a highly skilled Executive Assistant/Researcher to join our team in the real estate acquisition space. This is a Direct Hire position, and we require candidates to have at least 1-2 years of experience in an executive administrative role, solid English skills with a strong preference for those with a background in real estate verbiage and documentation. You must have aptitude to understand and navigate Family Trees effectively. Experience preferred with platforms such Ancestry, Findagrave and county websites. A background in private investigation or similar research-intensive work is highly preferred. This role is ideal for someone detail-oriented, investigative, and driven to uncover critical information. Minimal calls will be required for this position, so it’s perfect for those who prefer admin and research-focused tasks. Please DO NOT apply if you are new to this type of work. 

In this role, you will also handle communications between team members, organize and manage the company owner's communication and calendar, team member tasks, and oversee data management in our CRM. While on-the-job training will be provided for the CRM system, familiarity with tools such as Excel, Pipedrive, Google Calendar, Calendly,
/Instagram, Gmail is preferred. We are looking for someone who is humble, a go-getter, smart, and reliable and can see what needs to be done without being told. If you are ambitious and can manage tasks with minimal supervision, this opportunity is for you. 

Additionally, having an Upwork account with reviews is a bonus. Please do not apply if you are new to the executive assistant role, as we are seeking candidates with prior relevant experience and strong organizational skills. IMPORTANT INSTRUCTION: Send your applications to 
 and use keyword “ADMIN APPLICATION” as your subject line. Applications without the correct subject will not be reviewed. Include the following: 

1. Your Resume  2. DISC Test Result - Send us your recent test result from the test at this link: (https://discpersonalitytesting.com/free-disc-test/)  3. Video Introduction (1-2 Mins Long) Failure to follow instructions will result in your application being rejected. 

Starting Compensation: $4-5 per hour (Depends on Skill Level). Pay increases above that as skill level increases. We pay bonuses as well.

title: Content Production & Video Editing VA for Knitting Education Business
description:
I run a knitting education business with online classes, memberships, blog content, and social media. I’m looking for a reliable, detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to help me turn my teaching content into polished, published content across multiple platforms.



This is a part-time role to start, with room to grow over time if we’re a great fit.



Position Details



Title: Content Production & Video Editing VA for Knitting Education Business

Hours: Approximately 15 hours per week

Rate: $6 USD per hour

Location: Philippines preferred

Review: Pay and hours will be reviewed after 3 months based on performance, fit, and business needs



About the Role



This is not a general admin role.



I’m looking for someone who can support my content workflow, especially with:



video editing

content repurposing for social media

uploading and formatting content in my membership platform

basic blog post formatting

light website updates



My business has busy seasons and slower seasons, so the workload may ebb and flow somewhat. Over time, if you are a strong fit and show initiative, this role could grow in hours and responsibility.



Main Responsibilities



Your tasks may include:



Video Editing

Edit long-form teaching videos

Trim mistakes, pauses, and unnecessary sections

Add simple text, captions, or basic graphics when needed

Export videos in the correct format

Pull short clips from longer videos for social media

Content Uploading & Publishing

Upload completed videos into 

Embed content into Stitch Connect

Format lesson pages and organize content cleanly

Check that links, video embeds, and lesson materials are working properly

Social Media Content Support

Repurpose teaching content into short-form content

Draft captions based on my videos, blog posts, or teaching topics

Prepare social media posts for scheduling

Help organize and maintain a content calendar

Blog & Website Support

Format blog posts in Squarespace

Upload images and basic post elements

Add headings, alt text, meta descriptions, and internal links

Make simple website updates so the site stays current and active

General Content Organization

Keep digital files organized

Follow content checklists and workflows

Help track what content has been edited, uploaded, published, or scheduled

Ideal Candidate



I’m looking for someone who is:



reliable and consistent

detail-oriented

organized

comfortable following systems and checklists

able to communicate clearly in English

proactive when something seems unclear or missing

Because my business is in the knitting and fiber arts world, I strongly prefer someone who already understands this space.

title: AI Video Editor – DTC Ecommerce Ads
description:
We're a fast-growing DTC ecommerce brand and we're looking for an AI Video Editor who genuinely loves this stuff. Someone who keeps up with every new tool, knows what makes an ad convert, and can produce hyper-realistic AI creatives that audiences won't recognize as AI.



What you'll do:

- Produce 20 to 40 fully AI-generated video ads per week for our brands

- Create convincing AI talking heads, UGC-style testimonials, and lifestyle b-roll using the latest generative tools

- Assemble and polish all content in CapCut to broadcast-ready quality

- Study winning creatives in Meta Ads Library and TikTok Creative Center to figure out what's converting

- Come up with your own ad variations (hooks, formats, CTAs) and execute them without needing to be walked through it

- Jump in on scripting when needed, though scripts are usually provided



What we're looking for:

- A real track record making AI-generated video ads for DTC ecommerce brands. We want to see your work, not just hear about it

- Solid hands-on experience with tools like ElevenLabs, Higgsfield, Kling, or something comparable

- Expert-level CapCut skills, timings, transitions, captions, sound design, all of it

- The ability to generate photorealistic AI people, products, and scenes that actually hold up

- A good instinct for direct-response creative. You understand hooks, pacing, and why certain ads sell

- High autonomy. You manage your own pipeline, hit volume targets, and don't need someone checking in on you constantly



Nice to have:

- Experience with Runway, Pika, Sora, or Midjourney

- Some background in paid social or performance marketing

- Comfortable working across multiple brand voices at the same time



This is a part-time role at 32 hours per week with flexible scheduling from Monday to Saturday.



How to Apply:



To show you've actually read this, start your application with the code 'AICreator851'. Then answer these questions:

1. Walk us through your full process for producing an AI-generated UGC-style ad, from receiving a script to handing off the final CapCut export. Be specific about each step and which tools you use along the way.

2. List every AI tool you use for video, image, and voice generation. For each one, tell us your proficiency level (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced) and what you actually use it for.

3. Realistic AI visuals are hard to pull off. What's your approach for making AI talking heads and product shots look genuine enough to run in paid ads? What do you do to avoid that typical AI look?

4. When you're looking at competitor ads for inspiration, what tells you an ad is probably converting well? And how do you turn that into your own creative?

5. How long does it realistically take you to deliver a finished 20 to 30 second AI-generated video ad from start to final file?

6. Share your portfolio. We want to see hyper-realistic AI ad creatives made for DTC ecommerce specifically, not motion graphics or experimental work.

title: VIDEO AD EDITOR — DIRECT RESPONSE ADS (AI + EDITING)
description:
ABOUT US

We are a growing financial services company running paid acquisition on Meta 
 and Instagram). We are scaling our ad creative production and need a skilled video editor who can turn concepts into high-performing direct response video ads.





THE ROLE

We provide the ad concepts, scripts, and strategy. You bring them to life — end to end. That means:



- Taking our written concepts/scripts and producing finished video ads

- Sourcing footage — generating with AI tools (Nano Banana, Veo3, Kling, etc.), finding relevant clips from social media, or using stock footage

- Full editing: cuts, transitions, text overlays, captions, sound design, music

- Creating scroll-stopping hooks and maintaining fast pacing for social media

- Producing multiple variations/versions for A/B testing

- Delivering final files optimized for Meta ads (9:16, 1:1, 4:5 formats)



This is NOT a basic editing role. We need someone who can take a concept doc and deliver a complete, ready-to-run ad — including sourcing all the visual content.





REQUIREMENTS



- Proven experience creating FULL direct response video ads (not just cuts or captions on existing videos — we want to see complete ads you built from scratch)

- Understanding of what makes people stop scrolling and click

- Proficiency in video editing software (Premiere Pro, After Effects, CapCut Pro, DaVinci Resolve, or similar)

- Experience with AI video generation tools

- Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

- Fast turnaround — we test new creatives every week

- Reliable internet connection and your own equipment





NICE TO HAVE



- Experience in finance, trading, or fintech niches

- Understanding of Meta ad specs and best practices

- Experience creating UGC-style ads

- Motion graphics / After Effects skills





COMPENSATION



Based on experience. Please state your hourly rate in your application.





HOW TO APPLY



Do NOT send a message here.



Apply through this form only:





You MUST include a portfolio link with direct response video ads you created yourself (full ads, not partial edits). Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.

title: Performance Marketing Manager Google and Meta
description:
Job Title: Performance Marketing Manager

Location: Remote

Job Type: Full-time



About Wandering Lion 



Wandering Lion is a strategy-led growth studio helping founder-led businesses build premium brands, install scalable growth systems, and generate measurable commercial outcomes — without chaos. We do not sell marketing activity for the sake of it. We build structured growth systems that connect brand, performance, systems, and reporting to real business results.



Our model is disciplined: foundation first, then build, then scale. That means we care deeply about clarity, accountability, and making sure paid media works inside a stronger commercial system — not in isolation.



The Role



We are looking for a commercially sharp Performance Marketing Manager to lead campaign execution, optimisation, and channel development across Google Ads, Meta Ads, and other current or emerging paid acquisition platforms.



This role is not limited to today’s core channels. As the business grows, this position may also support expansion into additional advertising ecosystems, marketing technology, AI-enabled tools, automation platforms, and other digital growth systems that improve performance, reporting, and operational efficiency.



This is not a button-pushing media buying role. We want someone who understands that ads amplify clarity — they do not create it — and who can help translate strategy into efficient, measurable growth.



You will work across founder-led brands that need more than clicks and impressions. They need disciplined media execution, better conversion performance, clearer reporting, and someone who understands the commercial outcome behind the spend. Our ideal clients value structure, proof, and accountability, so your work must reflect that standard.



Key Responsibilities



Paid media strategy and planning

Build channel strategies across Google, Meta, and other relevant paid platforms based on client goals, audience behaviour, customer journey stage, and conversion priorities.



Campaign setup and execution

Launch, manage, and optimise campaigns across search, display, remarketing, paid social, and future paid channels where appropriate.



Audience, keyword, and market research

Conduct keyword research, audience segmentation, competitor review, and targeting refinement to improve efficiency and lead quality.



Creative and messaging alignment

Work closely with strategy and creative to ensure ad messaging reflects the brand, strengthens trust, and supports conversion.



Testing and optimisation

Run structured tests across headlines, copy, creative, offers, landing pages, audience segments, and funnel stages to improve performance over time.



Budget and bid management

Allocate spend carefully, adjust bids based on performance, and manage budgets with commercial discipline.



Performance reporting

Translate campaign and funnel data into clear reporting that explains what happened, what it means, and what we do next.



Technology and AI adoption

Help identify and implement useful tools, AI software, automation workflows, and platform enhancements that improve campaign performance, efficiency, internal reporting, or client delivery.



Conversion and systems thinking

Monitor lead quality, conversion paths, attribution, and funnel performance — not just platfor
trics — to support real business outcomes.



What We’re Looking For

Proven experience managing Google Ads and Meta Ads accounts with measurable results

Strong understanding of paid media fundamentals, attribution, conversion tracking, and optimisation

Confidence learning and adapting to new advertising platforms, AI tools, and digital systems as the role evolves

Ability to think beyond platfor
trics and connect spend to commercial outcomes

Strong communication skills and the ability to explain performance clearly

A structured, accountable, detail-driven approach to campaign management

Comfort working in a business that values quality over volume and clarity over noise

Preferred

Experience across service-based businesses, eCommerce, trades, or founder-led brands

Familiarity with landing page optimisation and CRO principles

Experience using AI tools, automation platforms, reporting dashboards, or workflow software to improve marketing operations

Google Ads certifications

Meta advertising certifications

Experience using CRM, analytics, and reporting platforms

What Success Looks Like in This Role

Campaigns are well-structured, well-managed, and commercially aligned

Reporting is clear, useful, and trusted by clients

Paid media performance improves through disciplined testing and optimisation

Useful tools and systems are introduced where they genuinely improve efficiency or outcomes

Clients feel confident that spend is being managed with accountability

You contribute to a premium client experience, not just campaign delivery

Why Join Wandering Lion



You’ll be joining a business built around calm authority, commercial clarity, and human confidence. We are not trying to become a high-volume agency. We are building a quality-protected growth studio that integrates brand, performance, and systems under one roof.



That means:



You’ll work on higher-quality engagements

You’ll be part of a strategy-led model, not random execution

You’ll collaborate with a team that values standards, structure, and outcomes

You’ll help build growth systems that genuinely move businesses forward

Before We Proceed



Before we potentially move to the interview stage, we’d like to gather a few details to make sure the role is a strong fit and that you’ll be set up for success working remotely with our team.



1. PC / Laptop specifications + internet speed

Please share your device specifications, including CPU, RAM, and storage, along with a recent internet speed test result. Reliable performance and strong internet are essential for day-to-day work.



2. Current employment or side work

Are you currently employed or doing any freelance or side work? We are open to offshore tea
mbers having multiple roles. What matters most to us is transparency, so we understand your typical schedule and can support you properly.



3. Hubstaff tracker

Are you comfortable using Hubstaff time tracking? Our whole team operates remotely, including our field and admin staff in Australia. Hubstaff helps us understand time allocation across projects, improve internal reporting, and provide clearer updates to clients.



4. Working hours / availability

Can you commit to the required hours? Our standard workdays are Monday to Friday, generally within 9:00am–5:00pm Philippines time. We offer reasonable flexibility — family and life come first — but we do need consistency and clear communication.



5. Expected salary (PHP)

If this differs from what was listed in the advert, please confirm your expected salary in PHP.



6. CV / Resume

Please attach your CV if you have not already done so.



7. Relevant training / courses

Please include any relevant training, certifications, or courses you have completed.



8. English level

Please confirm your English level (C2) and your confidence in both written and spoken English.



Team Context



For context, we currently have a team of 10 people in the Philippines, all working from home, and we are continuing to grow. We value honesty, transparency, and teamwork. We are looking for people who are humble, reliable, and easy to work with — because every role matters, and the most important thing is a happy team doing work they enjoy, surrounded by like-minded people.



How to Apply



Please send your CV, a short introduction, and responses to the questions above, along with 2–3 examples of accounts, campaigns, platforms, or systems you have worked on and the commercial outcomes achieved.



Thank you. We look forward to hearing from you.

+ Strong problem-solving skills and the ability to work independently or as part of a team.

PLEASE READ THIS CAREFULLY:

IMPORTANT: In your message, please provide a short paragraph explaining why you're the best candidate for this position. And provide your company website for review.



Do NOT contact us directly. Until we permit you, all communications will go through OnlineJobs.ph



YOU MUST FOLLOW ALL OF THESE INSTRUCTIONS PRECISELY. WE ARE LOOKING TO SEE IF YOU CAN FOLLOW INSTRUCTIONS.



We will Not consider you if you can Not follow ALL of these instructions. Why? You may ask.



We figure that if you can't follow instructions before you start working with us, how will you be able to follow them after you start working for us?



Thank you for reading our ad, and we wish you all the best!





Regards,





Phong (Peter) Nguyen.

If you’re passionate about thoughtful design, continuous growth, and meaningful creative work, we’d love to see your portfolio.

title: PHP Developer
description:
Experienced with PHP/MySQL and love the web process development? Do you enjoy the thrill of hunting down bugs and errors, getting to the bottom of the "why" to prevent them from recurring? Are you someone who takes pride in your work and is known for your integrity (and not trying to turn in Claude/AI work as your own)? The Role

You'll create custom code components and software integrations for various platforms, ensuring our partner websites are functional, responsive, and perform optimally. You develop solutions while solving code problems.

- Ensure software meets security and standards compliance.

- Use Git and SVN for source code control and versioning.

- Scope project requirements and offer technical insights.



Must-Have

- Strong problem-solving and debugging skills in complex or poorly documented environments



Requirements



- *Proficient in PHP, MySQL, CSS, SASS, HTML, and JavaScript.

- Experienced with command line and server administration.

- Skilled in developing web architecture from functional and business requirements.

- Experienced with PHP-based CMS, WordPress, and JavaScript frameworks like React, Vue, or Angular (v8+).

- Loves AI-help, but can do the actual work.

- Strong understanding of coding best practices.

- Understanding of the HubSpot developer requirements and Hub's.

- Advanced experience with version control systems like Git.

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills.

- Self-motivated and able to work in a dynamic environment.



What's Offered

- USD-based salary (based on experience - quick growth potential)

- Supportive team (including co-workers in Ph)

- Non-corporate environment promoting growth and idea-sharing



Requirements

- Punctual and reliable with tasks and deadlines (*read that again)

- Actually read the job requirements and salary offered

- Excellent written and verbal communication skills

- Ability to handle multiple projects in a fast-paced setting

- Strong logical thinking and problem-solving skills

- Self-motivated, eager to learn, and organized

- AI-proficient and know how to use it wisely



Interested applicants are encouraged to apply - tell us why you're great, use AI if you want to help you, but if you copy and paste, we'll know and disqualify you. We are looking for professionals with a good attitude who want to work with like-minded individuals and are serious about a career, not just a job.

title: Account Manager & Growth Coordinator
description:
About Concierge Drop



Concierge Drop is a fast-growing premium, on-demand home services company based in New York City. We partner with luxury residential buildings to offer residents door-to-door dry cleaning, laundry, home cleaning and more, all booked online and fulfilled by our vetted local vendor network.



We currently operate across 130+ buildings in NYC and are scaling toward city-wide coverage. We’re a small, fast-moving team - if you like ownership, variety and working directly with a founder, this is the right role.



The Role:



We’re looking for an exceptionally organized Account Manager & Growth Coordinator to own the health and growth of our building portfolio. You’ll be the day-to-day point of contact for our property managers across NYC, track account performance, coordinate resident events and marketing campaigns and make sure nothing falls through the cracks.



You’ll work from a structured Google Sheets workspace with a clear daily task queue and use HubSpot for all outreach. No technical or coding skills required, but extreme organization, excellent written English, and genuine follow-through are non-negotiable.



As Concierge Drop grows, this role grows with it. If you have a background in marketing, PPC, or social media, there’s additional scope to take on resident-facing campaigns and growth initiatives beyond account management.



What You’ll Do:



Account Health: Your #1 priority:

- Monitor a portfolio of 130+ NYC residential buildings using our tracking dashboard

- Flag buildings with declining order rates, missed follow-ups or overdue invoices before they become problems

- Ensure no building goes more than 30 days without meaningful contact



Property Manager Relationships:

- Own the contact log for every property manager - calls,
s, follow-up dates, relationship status

- Send warm check-in
s, schedule calls and keep relationships active and healthy

- Log every interaction in Google Sheets and HubSpot with clear notes and next steps



Resident Events & Engagement:

- Coordinate lobby pop-ups, door drops and resident events with property managers

- Track event history across all buildings and flag accounts overdue for activation (target: every 5–6 months)

- Draft resident-facing
s and SMS campaigns in HubSpot to drive bookings



Campaign & Promotion Tracking:

- Log all outreach campaigns, promo codes, and activations in our Campaign Log

- Track order volume before and after each campaign to measure what’s working

- Suggest simple, cost-effective promotions based on building performance data



Day-to-Day Operations:

- Maintain bag stock levels across buildings and flag restock needs

- Manage the staff referral program (track progress and coordinate gift card payouts)

- Update the Building Health Dashboard weekly so the team always has a live picture



Marketing & Growth (bonus scope):

- If you have marketing experience: assist with Google/Meta PPC campaigns targeting NYC residential buildings

- Help build and manage social media content that supports resident awareness and brand growth

- Identify and execute low-cost marketing plays to drive new resident signups at existing buildings





You’re the Right Person If You…



- Are obsessively organized - you live by your task list, nothing slips, and you follow up without being reminded

- Write excellent, professional English - your
s go directly to NYC property managers and need to reflect well on our brand

- Have experience managing client or account relationships in any industry

- Are comfortable with HubSpot or a similar CRM for contact management and
 outreach

- Know your way around Google Sheets — not a developer, but confident and capable

- Are proactive by default — you see what needs to be done and do it

- Can work independently with minimal hand-holding

- Have some availability overlap with US Eastern Time



Bonus Points If You Have: 

- Experience running Google Ads, Meta Ads, or any PPC campaigns

- Social media management background (content creation, scheduling, engagement)

-
 marketing experience beyond basic sending — sequences, segmentation, A/B testing

- Background in property management, real estate, or hospitality

- Experience coordinating in-person events or activations



What We Offer:

- Remote, part-time role (~20 hours/week to start)

- Compensation discussed with shortlisted candidates based on experience and scope

- Direct working relationship with the founder of a growing NYC startup

- Clear daily workflows; you’ll always know what to focus on

- Real ownership over a key part of the business. Your work directly drives revenue

- Opportunity to grow into a broader marketing and growth role as the company scales



To Apply:

We read every application personally. To be considered, please include all four of the following - applications missing any item will not be reviewed:



1. A short intro (3–5 sentences): who you are, where you’re based and why this role is a good fit for you right now

2. A specific example of a time you managed client relationships or kept a complex, multi-track project organized - what was the situation, what did you do, what was the outcome

3. Your availability: approximate hours per week and your timezone / overlap with US Eastern Time

4. Your tool experience: Briefly describe your experience with HubSpot (or similar CRM) and Google Sheets. If you have any PPC, social media, or
 marketing experience, mention that here too



Concierge Drop is an equal opportunity employer. We hire based on skill, follow-through, and fit.

title: Community Engagement Specialist – Real Estate Forums (Reddit & BiggerPockets)
description:
About Us

DealScore is a real estate deal analysis tool that helps house flippers and investors calculate ARV (After Repair Value) and construction costs by zip code. We have a freemium model with a growing user base and we need help getting the word out in the communities where our users spend their time.



The Role

You'll be our voice in online real estate investing communities — primarily Reddit and BiggerPockets. Your job is to monitor relevant threads, provide genuinely helpful answers to investor questions, and naturally introduce DealScore when it's relevant. This is NOT spamming links or copy-pasting sales pitches. Think of it as being the most helpful person in the room who happens to know about a great tool.



What You'll Do Every Day (1–2 hours/day, 5 days/week)

Monitor 3–5 subreddits and BiggerPockets forums for relevant threads using keyword alerts

Draft and post 3–5 thoughtful, authentic replies per day

Post 1 original thread per week (deal analysis, tip, or discussion question)

Track all activity in a shared Google Sheet

Send a weekly summary report every Friday



You'll Create Your Own Accounts

You will create fresh Reddit and BiggerPockets accounts for this role (not your personal accounts). You'll need to build karma and credibility naturally in the first week before engaging on behalf of DealScore. We'll provide a full onboarding playbook with tone guidelines, example replies, and a list of keywords to monitor.



Must-Haves

Strong English writing skills — conversational, not corporate

Familiarity with Reddit (you understand karma, subreddit rules, and community culture)

Ability to write responses that sound like a real person, not a marketer

Self-directed and consistent — you'll work independently with weekly check-ins

Reliable internet and available during US business hours (at least partial overlap with EST)



Nice-to-Haves (Not Required)

Familiarity with real estate investing concepts (ARV, rehab costs, flipping)

Experience with BiggerPockets forums

Previous community management or forum engagement experience

Experience using keyword monitoring tools (F5Bot, etc.)



First Two Weeks

Week 1 is an approval period — you'll draft replies and I'll review before you post. Week 2 shifts to independent posting with spot-checks. Full onboarding playbook provided on Day 1.

Compensation

$300–400/month depending on experience, paid monthly. Bonus opportunity: per-referral bonus for tracked paid signups from your engagement.



To Apply

Please include in your application:

A short paragraph about any experience you have with Reddit or online forums

A sample reply to this thread: "First time flipper — how do I figure out what a house will be worth after I renovate it?"

Your Reddit username if you have one (not required, but helpful)



Note: If you don't know much about real estate investing yet, that's okay — we'll train you. What matters most is your writing quality and understanding of how online communities work.

title: Social Media Engagement Specialist (Instagram Growth & DM Outreach)
description:
We are a luxury travel brand specializing in cruise experiences, group trips, and high-end travel.

We are looking for a Social Media Engagement Specialist to help grow our Instagram organically by starting conversations and engaging with potential clients.

Your role is NOT just liking posts — your role is to create real conversations that turn followers into clients.

Daily Responsibilities:

Reply to all comments on posts in an engaging and conversational way

Engage with 40–60 targeted accounts per day (travel, cruise, luxury lifestyle)

Send messages to new followers to start conversations

Respond to story viewers and engage with their content

Help increase engagement, comments, and direct messages

Requirements:

Strong written English

Friendly, natural, and conversational tone

Experience with Instagram engagement preferred

Must engage manually (NO bots or automation tools)

Goal:

Increase organic engagement, build relationships, and generate conversations that lead to potential clients.

To apply:

Include the word "CRUISE" in your application so we know you read this.
